Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.PartA.
Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.Nat.
Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.Tactics.

Require Import UniMath.Algebra.Matrix.

Require Import UniMath.Algebra.Domains_and_Fields.
Require Import UniMath.Algebra.Matrix.
Require Import UniMath.Algebra.RigsAndRings.
Require Import UniMath.Algebra.IteratedBinaryOperations.

Require Import UniMath.Algebra.GaussianElimination.Auxiliary.
Require Import UniMath.Algebra.GaussianElimination.Vectors.
Require Import UniMath.Algebra.GaussianElimination.Matrices.
Require Import UniMath.Algebra.GaussianElimination.Elimination.

(**
  In this module, we define a back-substitution procedure that works on
  nxn matrices that are upper triangular with all non-zero diagonal.

  We use this procedure to show that any nxn matrix either not invertible,
  or calculate its inverse.

  Primary Author: Daniel @Skantz (November 2022)
*)

Definition matrix_inverse_or_non_invertible_stmt
  { n : nat } {F : fld}
  (A : Matrix F n n)
  := coprod (@matrix_inverse F n A)
            (@matrix_inverse F n A -> empty).

Definition back_sub_stmt
  { n : nat } {F : fld}
  (mat : Matrix F n n)
  (vec : Vector F n)
  (ut : @is_upper_triangular F _ _ mat)
  (df : @diagonal_all_nonzero F _ mat)
  := ∑ v : (Vector F n),
    (@matrix_mult F _ _ mat _ (col_vec v)) = (col_vec vec).


Section BackSub.

  Context (F : fld).

  Local Notation Σ := (iterop_fun (@ringunel1 F) op1).
  Local Notation "A ** B" := (@matrix_mult F _ _ A _ B) (at level 40, left associativity).
  Local Notation "R1 *pw R2" := ((pointwise _ op2) R1 R2) (at level 40, left associativity).

  (** output: a solution [x]_[row] to [mat ** x = b]_[row] if one exists
     - given mat upper triangular, non-zero diagonal. Later applied inductively in [back_sub]. *)
  
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
Vector F n

  
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
Vector F n

    
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
F

    
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
p: row = i
F
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
h: row ≠ i
F

    
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
p: row = i
F
 exact (((b i) * fldmultinv' (mat i i))
           - ((Σ (mat i *pw x) - (x  i)* (mat i i))
           * (fldmultinv' (mat i i))))%ring.
    
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
h: row ≠ i
F
 exact (x i).
  Defined.

  (** procedure gives [x_i] s.t. [(mat ** x)_i = b_i], given previous assumptions *)
  
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
p: is_upper_triangular mat
p': mat row row != 0%ring
matrix_mult mat (col_vec (back_sub_step row mat x b))
  row = col_vec b row

  
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
p: is_upper_triangular mat
p': mat row row != 0%ring
matrix_mult mat (col_vec (back_sub_step row mat x b))
  row = col_vec b row

    
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
p: is_upper_triangular mat
p': mat row row != 0%ring
matrix_mult mat
  (λ (i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (_ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn),
   match nat_eq_or_neq row i with
   | inl _ =>
       (b i * fldmultinv' (mat i i) -
        (iterop_fun 0 op1 (mat i *pw x) -
         x i * mat i i) * fldmultinv' (mat i i))%ring
   | inr _ => x i
   end) row = (λ _ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn, b row)

    
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
p: is_upper_triangular mat
p': mat row row != 0%ring
matrix_mult mat
  (λ (i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (_ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn),
   match nat_eq_or_neq row i with
   | inl _ =>
       (b i *
        match fldchoice0 (mat i i) with
        | inl _ => 0
        | inr n => fldmultinv (mat i i) n
        end -
        (iterop_fun 0 op1 (mat i *pw x) -
         x i * mat i i) *
        match fldchoice0 (mat i i) with
        | inl _ => 0
        | inr n => fldmultinv (mat i i) n
        end)%ring
   | inr _ => x i
   end) row = (λ _ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn, b row)

    
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
p: is_upper_triangular mat
p': mat row row != 0%ring
(λ _ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn,
 iterop_fun 0%rig op1
   (λ k : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (mat row k *
     match nat_eq_or_neq row k with
     | inl _ =>
         b k *
         match fldchoice0 (mat k k) with
         | inl _ => 0
         | inr n => fldmultinv (mat k k) n
         end -
         (iterop_fun 0 op1
            (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, mat k i * x i) -
          x k * mat k k) *
         match fldchoice0 (mat k k) with
         | inl _ => 0
         | inr n => fldmultinv (mat k k) n
         end
     | inr _ => x k
     end)%ring)) = (λ _ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn, b row)

    
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
p: is_upper_triangular mat
p': mat row row != 0%ring
m:= n - S row: ℕ
(λ _ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn,
 iterop_fun 0%rig op1
   (λ k : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (mat row k *
     match nat_eq_or_neq row k with
     | inl _ =>
         b k *
         match fldchoice0 (mat k k) with
         | inl _ => 0
         | inr n => fldmultinv (mat k k) n
         end -
         (iterop_fun 0 op1
            (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, mat k i * x i) -
          x k * mat k k) *
         match fldchoice0 (mat k k) with
         | inl _ => 0
         | inr n => fldmultinv (mat k k) n
         end
     | inr _ => x k
     end)%ring)) = (λ _ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn, b row)

    
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
p: is_upper_triangular mat
p': mat row row != 0%ring
m:= n - S row: ℕ
n = S row + m
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
p: is_upper_triangular mat
p': mat row row != 0%ring
m:= n - S row: ℕ
split_eq: n = S row + m
(λ _ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn,
 iterop_fun 0%rig op1
   (λ k : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (mat row k *
     match nat_eq_or_neq row k with
     | inl _ =>
         b k *
         match fldchoice0 (mat k k) with
         | inl _ => 0
         | inr n => fldmultinv (mat k k) n
         end -
         (iterop_fun 0 op1
            (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, mat k i * x i) -
          x k * mat k k) *
         match fldchoice0 (mat k k) with
         | inl _ => 0
         | inr n => fldmultinv (mat k k) n
         end
     | inr _ => x k
     end)%ring)) = (λ _ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn, b row)

    
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
p: is_upper_triangular mat
p': mat row row != 0%ring
m:= n - S row: ℕ
n = S row + m
 
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
p: is_upper_triangular mat
p': mat row row != 0%ring
m:= n - S row: ℕ
n = S row + (n - S row)

      
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
p: is_upper_triangular mat
p': mat row row != 0%ring
m:= n - S row: ℕ
n = n
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
p: is_upper_triangular mat
p': mat row row != 0%ring
m:= n - S row: ℕ
n ≥ S row

      
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
p: is_upper_triangular mat
p': mat row row != 0%ring
m:= n - S row: ℕ
n = n
 apply idpath.
      
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
p: is_upper_triangular mat
p': mat row row != 0%ring
m:= n - S row: ℕ
n ≥ S row
 exact (pr2 row). 
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
p: is_upper_triangular mat
p': mat row row != 0%ring
m:= n - S row: ℕ
split_eq: n = S row + m
(λ _ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn,
 iterop_fun 0%rig op1
   (λ k : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (mat row k *
     match nat_eq_or_neq row k with
     | inl _ =>
         b k *
         match fldchoice0 (mat k k) with
         | inl _ => 0
         | inr n => fldmultinv (mat k k) n
         end -
         (iterop_fun 0 op1
            (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, mat k i * x i) -
          x k * mat k k) *
         match fldchoice0 (mat k k) with
         | inl _ => 0
         | inr n => fldmultinv (mat k k) n
         end
     | inr _ => x k
     end)%ring)) = (λ _ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn, b row)

    
F: fld
s_row: ℕ
s_row_eq: S s_row = S s_row
row: (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F (S s_row) (S s_row)
x, b: Vector F (S s_row)
p: is_upper_triangular mat
p': mat row row != 0%ring
m:= S s_row - S row: ℕ
split_eq: S s_row = S row + m
(λ _ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn,
 iterop_fun 0%rig op1
   (λ k : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn,
    (mat row k *
     match nat_eq_or_neq row k with
     | inl _ =>
         b k *
         match fldchoice0 (mat k k) with
         | inl _ => 0
         | inr n => fldmultinv (mat k k) n
         end -
         (iterop_fun 0 op1
            (λ i : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn, mat k i * x i) -
          x k * mat k k) *
         match fldchoice0 (mat k k) with
         | inl _ => 0
         | inr n => fldmultinv (mat k k) n
         end
     | inr _ => x k
     end)%ring)) = (λ _ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn, b row)

    
F: fld
s_row: ℕ
s_row_eq: S s_row = S s_row
row: (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F (S s_row) (S s_row)
x, b: Vector F (S s_row)
p: is_upper_triangular mat
p': mat row row != 0%ring
m:= S s_row - S row: ℕ
split_eq: S s_row = S row + m
x0: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
iterop_fun 0%rig op1
  (λ k : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn,
   (mat row k *
    match nat_eq_or_neq row k with
    | inl _ =>
        b k *
        match fldchoice0 (mat k k) with
        | inl _ => 0
        | inr n => fldmultinv (mat k k) n
        end -
        (iterop_fun 0 op1
           (λ i : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn, mat k i * x i) -
         x k * mat k k) *
        match fldchoice0 (mat k k) with
        | inl _ => 0
        | inr n => fldmultinv (mat k k) n
        end
    | inr _ => x k
    end)%ring) = b row

    
F: fld
s_row: ℕ
s_row_eq: S s_row = S s_row
row: (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F (S s_row) (S s_row)
x, b: Vector F (S s_row)
p: is_upper_triangular mat
p': mat row row != 0%ring
m:= S s_row - S row: ℕ
split_eq: S s_row = S row + m
x0: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
(iterop_fun 0%rig op1
   ((λ k : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn,
     mat row k *
     match nat_eq_or_neq row k with
     | inl _ =>
         b k *
         match fldchoice0 (mat k k) with
         | inl _ => 0
         | inr n => fldmultinv (mat k k) n
         end -
         (iterop_fun 0 op1
            (λ i : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn, mat k i * x i) -
          x k * mat k k) *
         match fldchoice0 (mat k k) with
         | inl _ => 0
         | inr n => fldmultinv (mat k k) n
         end
     | inr _ => x k
     end) ∘ dni row) +
 mat row row *
 (b row *
  match fldchoice0 (mat row row) with
  | inl _ => 0
  | inr n => fldmultinv (mat row row) n
  end -
  (iterop_fun 0 op1
     (λ i : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn, mat row i * x i) -
   x row * mat row row) *
  match fldchoice0 (mat row row) with
  | inl _ => 0
  | inr n => fldmultinv (mat row row) n
  end))%ring = b row

    
F: fld
s_row: ℕ
s_row_eq: S s_row = S s_row
row: (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F (S s_row) (S s_row)
x, b: Vector F (S s_row)
p: is_upper_triangular mat
p': mat row row != 0%ring
m:= S s_row - S row: ℕ
split_eq: S s_row = S row + m
x0: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
p0: mat row row = 0%ring
(iterop_fun 0%rig op1
   ((λ k : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn,
     mat row k *
     match nat_eq_or_neq row k with
     | inl _ =>
         b k *
         match fldchoice0 (mat k k) with
         | inl _ => 0
         | inr n => fldmultinv (mat k k) n
         end -
         (iterop_fun 0 op1
            (λ i : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn, mat k i * x i) -
          x k * mat k k) *
         match fldchoice0 (mat k k) with
         | inl _ => 0
         | inr n => fldmultinv (mat k k) n
         end
     | inr _ => x k
     end) ∘ dni row) +
 mat row row *
 (b row * 0 -
  (iterop_fun 0 op1
     (λ i : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn, mat row i * x i) -
   x row * mat row row) * 0))%ring = b row
F: fld
s_row: ℕ
s_row_eq: S s_row = S s_row
row: (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F (S s_row) (S s_row)
x, b: Vector F (S s_row)
p: is_upper_triangular mat
p': mat row row != 0%ring
m:= S s_row - S row: ℕ
split_eq: S s_row = S row + m
x0: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
neq: mat row row != 0%ring
(iterop_fun 0%rig op1
   ((λ k : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn,
     mat row k *
     match nat_eq_or_neq row k with
     | inl _ =>
         b k *
         match fldchoice0 (mat k k) with
         | inl _ => 0
         | inr n => fldmultinv (mat k k) n
         end -
         (iterop_fun 0 op1
            (λ i : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn, mat k i * x i) -
          x k * mat k k) *
         match fldchoice0 (mat k k) with
         | inl _ => 0
         | inr n => fldmultinv (mat k k) n
         end
     | inr _ => x k
     end) ∘ dni row) +
 mat row row *
 (b row * fldmultinv (mat row row) neq -
  (iterop_fun 0 op1
     (λ i : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn, mat row i * x i) -
   x row * mat row row) * 
  fldmultinv (mat row row) neq))%ring = 
b row

    
F: fld
s_row: ℕ
s_row_eq: S s_row = S s_row
row: (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F (S s_row) (S s_row)
x, b: Vector F (S s_row)
p: is_upper_triangular mat
p': mat row row != 0%ring
m:= S s_row - S row: ℕ
split_eq: S s_row = S row + m
x0: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
p0: mat row row = 0%ring
(iterop_fun 0%rig op1
   ((λ k : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn,
     mat row k *
     match nat_eq_or_neq row k with
     | inl _ =>
         b k *
         match fldchoice0 (mat k k) with
         | inl _ => 0
         | inr n => fldmultinv (mat k k) n
         end -
         (iterop_fun 0 op1
            (λ i : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn, mat k i * x i) -
          x k * mat k k) *
         match fldchoice0 (mat k k) with
         | inl _ => 0
         | inr n => fldmultinv (mat k k) n
         end
     | inr _ => x k
     end) ∘ dni row) +
 mat row row *
 (b row * 0 -
  (iterop_fun 0 op1
     (λ i : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn, mat row i * x i) -
   x row * mat row row) * 0))%ring = b row
contradiction. 
F: fld
s_row: ℕ
s_row_eq: S s_row = S s_row
row: (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F (S s_row) (S s_row)
x, b: Vector F (S s_row)
p: is_upper_triangular mat
p': mat row row != 0%ring
m:= S s_row - S row: ℕ
split_eq: S s_row = S row + m
x0: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
neq: mat row row != 0%ring
(iterop_fun 0%rig op1
   ((λ k : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn,
     mat row k *
     match nat_eq_or_neq row k with
     | inl _ =>
         b k *
         match fldchoice0 (mat k k) with
         | inl _ => 0
         | inr n => fldmultinv (mat k k) n
         end -
         (iterop_fun 0 op1
            (λ i : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn, mat k i * x i) -
          x k * mat k k) *
         match fldchoice0 (mat k k) with
         | inl _ => 0
         | inr n => fldmultinv (mat k k) n
         end
     | inr _ => x k
     end) ∘ dni row) +
 mat row row *
 (b row * fldmultinv (mat row row) neq -
  (iterop_fun 0 op1
     (λ i : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn, mat row i * x i) -
   x row * mat row row) * fldmultinv (mat row row) neq))%ring =
b row

    
F: fld
s_row: ℕ
s_row_eq: S s_row = S s_row
row: (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F (S s_row) (S s_row)
x, b: Vector F (S s_row)
p: is_upper_triangular mat
p': mat row row != 0%ring
m:= S s_row - S row: ℕ
split_eq: S s_row = S row + m
x0: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
neq: mat row row != 0%ring
(iterop_fun 0%rig op1
   ((λ k : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn,
     mat row k *
     match nat_eq_or_neq row k with
     | inl _ =>
         b k *
         match fldchoice0 (mat k k) with
         | inl _ => 0
         | inr n => fldmultinv (mat k k) n
         end -
         (iterop_fun 0 op1
            (λ i : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn, mat k i * x i) -
          x k * mat k k) *
         match fldchoice0 (mat k k) with
         | inl _ => 0
         | inr n => fldmultinv (mat k k) n
         end
     | inr _ => x k
     end) ∘ dni row) +
 mat row row *
 (b row * fldmultinv (mat row row) neq -
  (iterop_fun 0 op1
     (λ i : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn, mat row i * x i) -
   x row * mat row row) * fldmultinv (mat row row) neq))%ring =
?b
F: fld
s_row: ℕ
s_row_eq: S s_row = S s_row
row: (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F (S s_row) (S s_row)
x, b: Vector F (S s_row)
p: is_upper_triangular mat
p': mat row row != 0%ring
m:= S s_row - S row: ℕ
split_eq: S s_row = S row + m
x0: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
neq: mat row row != 0%ring
?b = b row

    
F: fld
s_row: ℕ
s_row_eq: S s_row = S s_row
row: (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F (S s_row) (S s_row)
x, b: Vector F (S s_row)
p: is_upper_triangular mat
p': mat row row != 0%ring
m:= S s_row - S row: ℕ
split_eq: S s_row = S row + m
x0: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
neq: mat row row != 0%ring
(iterop_fun 0%rig op1
   ((λ k : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn,
     mat row k *
     match nat_eq_or_neq row k with
     | inl _ =>
         b k *
         match fldchoice0 (mat k k) with
         | inl _ => 0
         | inr n => fldmultinv (mat k k) n
         end -
         (iterop_fun 0 op1
            (λ i : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn, mat k i * x i) -
          x k * mat k k) *
         match fldchoice0 (mat k k) with
         | inl _ => 0
         | inr n => fldmultinv (mat k k) n
         end
     | inr _ => x k
     end) ∘ dni row) +
 mat row row *
 (b row * fldmultinv (mat row row) neq -
  (iterop_fun 0 op1
     (λ i : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn, mat row i * x i) -
   x row * mat row row) * fldmultinv (mat row row) neq))%ring =
?b
 
F: fld
s_row: ℕ
s_row_eq: S s_row = S s_row
row: (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F (S s_row) (S s_row)
x, b: Vector F (S s_row)
p: is_upper_triangular mat
p': mat row row != 0%ring
m:= S s_row - S row: ℕ
split_eq: S s_row = S row + m
x0: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
neq: mat row row != 0%ring
(λ k : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn,
 (mat row k *
  match nat_eq_or_neq row k with
  | inl _ =>
      b k *
      match fldchoice0 (mat k k) with
      | inl _ => 0
      | inr n => fldmultinv (mat k k) n
      end -
      (iterop_fun 0 op1
         (λ i : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn, mat k i * x i) -
       x k * mat k k) *
      match fldchoice0 (mat k k) with
      | inl _ => 0
      | inr n => fldmultinv (mat k k) n
      end
  | inr _ => x k
  end)%ring) ∘ dni row = ?t2

      
F: fld
s_row: ℕ
s_row_eq: S s_row = S s_row
row: (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F (S s_row) (S s_row)
x, b: Vector F (S s_row)
p: is_upper_triangular mat
p': mat row row != 0%ring
m:= S s_row - S row: ℕ
split_eq: S s_row = S row + m
x0: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
neq: mat row row != 0%ring
q: (⟦ s_row ⟧)%stn
((λ k : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn,
  (mat row k *
   match nat_eq_or_neq row k with
   | inl _ =>
       b k *
       match fldchoice0 (mat k k) with
       | inl _ => 0
       | inr n => fldmultinv (mat k k) n
       end -
       (iterop_fun 0 op1
          (λ i : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn, mat k i * x i) -
        x k * mat k k) *
       match fldchoice0 (mat k k) with
       | inl _ => 0
       | inr n => fldmultinv (mat k k) n
       end
   | inr _ => x k
   end)%ring) ∘ dni row) q = ?t2 q

      
F: fld
s_row: ℕ
s_row_eq: S s_row = S s_row
row: (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F (S s_row) (S s_row)
x, b: Vector F (S s_row)
p: is_upper_triangular mat
p': mat row row != 0%ring
m:= S s_row - S row: ℕ
split_eq: S s_row = S row + m
x0: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
neq: mat row row != 0%ring
q: (⟦ s_row ⟧)%stn
(mat row (dni row q) *
 match nat_eq_or_neq row (dni row q) with
 | inl _ =>
     b (dni row q) *
     match
       fldchoice0 (mat (dni row q) (dni row q))
     with
     | inl _ => 0
     | inr n =>
         fldmultinv (mat (dni row q) (dni row q)) n
     end -
     (iterop_fun 0 op1
        (λ i : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn,
         mat (dni row q) i * x i) -
      x (dni row q) * mat (dni row q) (dni row q)) *
     match
       fldchoice0 (mat (dni row q) (dni row q))
     with
     | inl _ => 0
     | inr n =>
         fldmultinv (mat (dni row q) (dni row q)) n
     end
 | inr _ => x (dni row q)
 end)%ring = ?t2 q

      now rewrite (nat_eq_or_neq_right (dni_neq_i row q)). 
F: fld
s_row: ℕ
s_row_eq: S s_row = S s_row
row: (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn

m:= S s_row - S row: ℕ
split_eq: S s_row = S row + m
x0: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
neq: mat row row != 0%ring
(iterop_fun 0%rig op1
   (λ q : (⟦ s_row ⟧)%stn,
    mat row (dni row q) * x (dni row q)) +
 mat row row *
 (b row * fldmultinv (mat row row) neq -
  (iterop_fun 0 op1
     (λ i : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn, mat row i * x i) -
   x row * mat row row) * fldmultinv (mat row row) neq))%ring =
b row

neq: mat row row != 0%ring
(fldmultinv (mat row row) neq * b row -
 (iterop_fun 0%rig op1
    ((λ i : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn, mat row i * x i)
     ∘ dni row) + mat row row * x row -
  x row * mat row row) * fldmultinv (mat row row) neq)%ring =

F: fld
s_row: ℕ
s_row_eq: S s_row = S s_row
row: (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F (S s_row) (S s_row)
x, b: Vector F (S s_row)
p: is_upper_triangular mat
p': mat row row != 0%ring
m:= S s_row - S row: ℕ
split_eq: S s_row = S row + m
x0: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
neq: mat row row != 0%ring
(-
 ((iterop_fun 0%rig op1
     ((λ i : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn, mat row i * x i)
      ∘ dni row) + mat row row * x row -
   x row * mat row row) * fldmultinv (mat row row) neq))%ring =
?t20

        now rewrite (@ringcomm2 F). 
F: fld
s_row: ℕ
s_row_eq: S s_row = S s_row
row: (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F (S s_row) (S s_row)
x, b: Vector F (S s_row)
p: is_upper_triangular mat
p': mat row row != 0%ring
m:= S s_row - S row: ℕ
split_eq: S s_row = S row + m
x0: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
neq: mat row row != 0%ring
(mat row row *
 (fldmultinv (mat row row) neq * b row -
  fldmultinv (mat row row) neq *
  (iterop_fun 0%rig op1
     ((λ i : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn, mat row i * x i)
      ∘ dni row) + mat row row * x row -
   x row * mat row row)))%ring = ?t2

      apply (@ringminusdistr' F (mat row row)).
    
F: fld
s_row: ℕ
s_row_eq: S s_row = S s_row
row: (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F (S s_row) (S s_row)
x, b: Vector F (S s_row)
p: is_upper_triangular mat
p': mat row row != 0%ring
m:= S s_row - S row: ℕ
split_eq: S s_row = S row + m
x0: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
neq: mat row row != 0%ring
(iterop_fun 0%rig op1
   (λ q : (⟦ s_row ⟧)%stn,
    mat row (dni row q) * x (dni row q)) +
 (mat row row * (fldmultinv (mat row row) neq * b row) -
  mat row row *
  (fldmultinv (mat row row) neq *
   (iterop_fun 0%rig op1
      ((λ i : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn, mat row i * x i)
       ∘ dni row) + mat row row * x row -
    x row * mat row row))))%ring = b row

 (mat row row *

      ((λ i : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn, mat row i * x i)

 now rewrite (@riglunax2 F). }
      
F: fld
s_row: ℕ
s_row_eq: S s_row = S s_row
row: (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F (S s_row) (S s_row)

p: is_upper_triangular mat
p': mat row row != 0%ring
m:= S s_row - S row: ℕ

x0: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
neq: mat row row != 0%ring
(-
 (mat row row *
  (fldmultinv (mat row row) neq *
   (iterop_fun 0%rig op1
      ((λ i : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn, mat row i * x i)
       ∘ dni row) + mat row row * x row -
    x row * mat row row))))%ring = ?y'
 
F: fld
s_row: ℕ
s_row_eq: S s_row = S s_row
row: (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F (S s_row) (S s_row)
x, b: Vector F (S s_row)
p: is_upper_triangular mat
p': mat row row != 0%ring
m:= S s_row - S row: ℕ
split_eq: S s_row = S row + m
x0: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
neq: mat row row != 0%ring
(mat row row *
 (fldmultinv (mat row row) neq *
  (iterop_fun 0%rig op1
     ((λ i : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn, mat row i * x i)
      ∘ dni row) + mat row row * x row -
   x row * mat row row)))%ring = ?t2

        
F: fld
s_row: ℕ
s_row_eq: S s_row = S s_row
row: (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F (S s_row) (S s_row)
x, b: Vector F (S s_row)
p: is_upper_triangular mat
p': mat row row != 0%ring
m:= S s_row - S row: ℕ
split_eq: S s_row = S row + m
x0: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
neq: mat row row != 0%ring
(1 *
 (iterop_fun 0%rig op1
    ((λ i : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn, mat row i * x i)
     ∘ dni row) + mat row row * x row -
  x row * mat row row))%ring = ?t2

        apply (@riglunax2 F). 
F: fld
s_row: ℕ
s_row_eq: S s_row = S s_row
row: (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F (S s_row) (S s_row)
x, b: Vector F (S s_row)
p: is_upper_triangular mat
p': mat row row != 0%ring
m:= S s_row - S row: ℕ
split_eq: S s_row = S row + m
x0: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
neq: mat row row != 0%ring
(iterop_fun 0%rig op1
   (λ q : (⟦ s_row ⟧)%stn,
    mat row (dni row q) * x (dni row q)) +
 (b row -
  (iterop_fun 0%rig op1
     ((λ i : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn, mat row i * x i)
      ∘ dni row) + mat row row * x row -
   x row * mat row row)))%ring = b row

    
F: fld
s_row: ℕ
s_row_eq: S s_row = S s_row
row: (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F (S s_row) (S s_row)
x, b: Vector F (S s_row)
p: is_upper_triangular mat
p': mat row row != 0%ring
m:= S s_row - S row: ℕ
split_eq: S s_row = S row + m
x0: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
neq: mat row row != 0%ring
(iterop_fun 0%rig op1
   (λ q : (⟦ s_row ⟧)%stn,
    mat row (dni row q) * x (dni row q)) +
 (b row -
  (iterop_fun 0%rig op1
     ((λ i : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn, mat row i * x i)
      ∘ dni row) + mat row row * x row -
   x row * mat row row)))%ring = ?b
F: fld
s_row: ℕ
s_row_eq: S s_row = S s_row
row: (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F (S s_row) (S s_row)
x, b: Vector F (S s_row)
p: is_upper_triangular mat
p': mat row row != 0%ring
m:= S s_row - S row: ℕ
split_eq: S s_row = S row + m
x0: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
neq: mat row row != 0%ring
?b = b row

    
F: fld
s_row: ℕ
s_row_eq: S s_row = S s_row
row: (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F (S s_row) (S s_row)
x, b: Vector F (S s_row)
p: is_upper_triangular mat
p': mat row row != 0%ring
m:= S s_row - S row: ℕ
split_eq: S s_row = S row + m
x0: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
neq: mat row row != 0%ring
(iterop_fun 0%rig op1
   (λ q : (⟦ s_row ⟧)%stn,
    mat row (dni row q) * x (dni row q)) +
 (b row -
  (iterop_fun 0%rig op1
     ((λ i : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn, mat row i * x i)
      ∘ dni row) + mat row row * x row -
   x row * mat row row)))%ring = ?b
 
F: fld
s_row: ℕ
s_row_eq: S s_row = S s_row
row: (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F (S s_row) (S s_row)
x, b: Vector F (S s_row)
p: is_upper_triangular mat
p': mat row row != 0%ring
m:= S s_row - S row: ℕ
split_eq: S s_row = S row + m
x0: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
neq: mat row row != 0%ring
(iterop_fun 0%rig op1
   ((λ i : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn, mat row i * x i)
    ∘ dni row) + mat row row * x row -
 x row * mat row row)%ring = ?t2

      now rewrite (@rigcomm2 F), (@ringplusminus F). 
F: fld
s_row: ℕ
s_row_eq: S s_row = S s_row
row: (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F (S s_row) (S s_row)
x, b: Vector F (S s_row)
p: is_upper_triangular mat
p': mat row row != 0%ring
m:= S s_row - S row: ℕ
split_eq: S s_row = S row + m
x0: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
neq: mat row row != 0%ring
(iterop_fun 0%rig op1
   (λ q : (⟦ s_row ⟧)%stn,
    mat row (dni row q) * x (dni row q)) +
 (b row -
  iterop_fun 0%rig op1
    ((λ i : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn, mat row i * x i)
     ∘ dni row)))%ring = b row

    
F: fld
s_row: ℕ
s_row_eq: S s_row = S s_row
row: (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F (S s_row) (S s_row)
x, b: Vector F (S s_row)
p: is_upper_triangular mat
p': mat row row != 0%ring
m:= S s_row - S row: ℕ
split_eq: S s_row = S row + m
x0: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
neq: mat row row != 0%ring
(b row +
 (-
  iterop_fun 0%rig op1
    ((λ i : (⟦ S s_row ⟧)%stn, mat row i * x i)
     ∘ dni row) +
  iterop_fun 0%rig op1
    (λ q : (⟦ s_row ⟧)%stn,
     mat row (dni row q) * x (dni row q))))%ring =
b row

    now rewrite (@ringlinvax1 F), (@rigrunax1 F).
  Defined.

  (** [back_sub_step] only modifies target element *)
  
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
∏ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
i ≠ row
→ col_vec (back_sub_step row mat x b) i = col_vec x i

  
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
∏ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
i ≠ row
→ col_vec (back_sub_step row mat x b) i = col_vec x i

    
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
ne: i ≠ row
col_vec (back_sub_step row mat x b) i = col_vec x i

    
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
ne: i ≠ row
(λ _ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn,
 match nat_eq_or_neq row i with
 | inl _ =>
     (b i * fldmultinv' (mat i i) -
      (iterop_fun 0 op1 (mat i *pw x) - x i * mat i i) *
      fldmultinv' (mat i i))%ring
 | inr _ => x i
 end) = (λ _ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn, x i)

    
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
ne: i ≠ row
(λ _ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn,
 match nat_eq_or_neq row i with
 | inl _ =>
     (b i * fldmultinv' (mat i i) -
      (iterop_fun 0 op1 (mat i *pw x) - x i * mat i i) *
      fldmultinv' (mat i i))%ring
 | inr _ => x i
 end) ~ (λ _ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn, x i)
 
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
ne: i ≠ row
j: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
match nat_eq_or_neq row i with
| inl _ =>
    (b i * fldmultinv' (mat i i) -
     (iterop_fun 0 op1 (mat i *pw x) - x i * mat i i) *
     fldmultinv' (mat i i))%ring
| inr _ => x i
end = x i

    
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
ne: i ≠ row
j: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
eq: row = i
(b i * fldmultinv' (mat i i) -
 (iterop_fun 0 op1 (mat i *pw x) - x i * mat i i) *
 fldmultinv' (mat i i))%ring = x i

    
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
ne: i ≠ i
j: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
eq: row = i
(b i * fldmultinv' (mat i i) -
 (iterop_fun 0 op1 (mat i *pw x) - x i * mat i i) *
 fldmultinv' (mat i i))%ring = x i

    contradiction (isirrefl_natneq _ ne).
  Defined.

  
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
is_ut: is_upper_triangular mat
∏ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
i ≥ row
→ mat i i != 0%ring
  → matrix_mult mat (col_vec x) i = col_vec b i
    → matrix_mult mat
        (col_vec (back_sub_step row mat x b)) i =
      col_vec b i

  
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
is_ut: is_upper_triangular mat
∏ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
i ≥ row
→ mat i i != 0%ring
  → matrix_mult mat (col_vec x) i = col_vec b i
    → matrix_mult mat
        (col_vec (back_sub_step row mat x b)) i =
      col_vec b i

    
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
is_ut: is_upper_triangular mat
∏ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
i ≥ row
→ mat i i != 0%ring
  → matrix_mult mat (col_vec x) i = col_vec b i
    → matrix_mult mat
        (col_vec (back_sub_step row mat x b)) i =
      col_vec b i

    
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
is_ut: is_upper_triangular mat
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
le: i ≥ row
neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
H: matrix_mult mat (col_vec x) i = col_vec b i
matrix_mult mat (col_vec (back_sub_step row mat x b))
  i = col_vec b i

le: i ≥ row

matrix_mult mat (col_vec (back_sub_step row mat x b))
  i = matrix_mult mat (col_vec x) i

F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
is_ut: is_upper_triangular mat

  i = matrix_mult mat (col_vec x) i

apply le.

F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
is_ut: is_upper_triangular mat
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
le: i ≥ row
neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
H: matrix_mult_unf mat (col_vec x) i = col_vec b i
lt: row < i
matrix_mult_unf mat
  (col_vec (back_sub_step row mat x b)) i =
matrix_mult mat (col_vec x) i

  (col_vec (back_sub_step row mat x b)) i

      
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
is_ut: is_upper_triangular mat
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
le: i ≥ row
neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
H: matrix_mult_unf mat (col_vec x) i = col_vec b i

F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
is_ut: is_upper_triangular mat
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
le: i ≥ row
neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
H: (λ j : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn,
 iterop_fun 0%rig op1
   (λ k : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (mat i k * col_vec x k j)%ring)) = 
col_vec b i
lt: row < i
(λ j : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn,
 iterop_fun 0%rig op1
   (λ k : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, (mat i k * col_vec x k j)%ring)) =
(λ j : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn,
 iterop_fun 0%rig op1
   (λ k : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (mat i k * col_vec (back_sub_step row mat x b) k j)%ring))

      
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
is_ut: is_upper_triangular mat
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
le: i ≥ row
neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
H: (λ j : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn,
 iterop_fun 0%rig op1
   (λ k : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (mat i k * col_vec x k j)%ring)) = 
col_vec b i
lt: row < i
x0: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
iterop_fun 0%rig op1
  (λ k : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, (mat i k * col_vec x k x0)%ring) =
iterop_fun 0%rig op1
  (λ k : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   (mat i k * col_vec (back_sub_step row mat x b) k x0)%ring)

      
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
is_ut: is_upper_triangular mat
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
le: i ≥ row
neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
H: (λ j : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn,
 iterop_fun 0%rig op1
   (λ k : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (mat i k * col_vec x k j)%ring)) = 
col_vec b i
lt: row < i
x0: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
(mat i i' * col_vec x i' x0)%ring =
(mat i i' * col_vec (back_sub_step row mat x b) i' x0)%ring

      
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
is_ut: is_upper_triangular mat
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
le: i ≥ row
neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
H: (λ j : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn,
 iterop_fun 0%rig op1
   (λ k : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (mat i k * col_vec x k j)%ring)) = 
col_vec b i
lt: row < i
x0: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
eq: i' = row
(mat i i' * col_vec x i' x0)%ring =
(mat i i' * col_vec (back_sub_step row mat x b) i' x0)%ring
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
is_ut: is_upper_triangular mat
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
le: i ≥ row
neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
H: (λ j : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn,
 iterop_fun 0%rig op1
   (λ k : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (mat i k * col_vec x k j)%ring)) = 
col_vec b i
lt: row < i
x0: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
neq: NegativePropositions.negProp_to_hProp
  (i' ≠ row)%stn
(mat i i' * col_vec x i' x0)%ring =
(mat i i' * col_vec (back_sub_step row mat x b) i' x0)%ring

      
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
is_ut: is_upper_triangular mat
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
le: i ≥ row
neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
H: (λ j : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn,
 iterop_fun 0%rig op1
   (λ k : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (mat i k * col_vec x k j)%ring)) = 
col_vec b i
lt: row < i
x0: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
neq: NegativePropositions.negProp_to_hProp
  (i' ≠ row)%stn
(mat i i' * col_vec x i' x0)%ring =
(mat i i' * col_vec (back_sub_step row mat x b) i' x0)%ring
 now rewrite back_sub_step_inv1. 
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
is_ut: is_upper_triangular mat
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
le: i ≥ row
neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
H: (λ j : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn,
 iterop_fun 0%rig op1
   (λ k : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (mat i k * col_vec x k j)%ring)) = 
col_vec b i
lt: row < i
x0: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
eq: i' = row
(mat i i' * col_vec x i' x0)%ring =
(mat i i' * col_vec (back_sub_step row mat x b) i' x0)%ring

      
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
is_ut: is_upper_triangular mat
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
le: i ≥ row
neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
H: (λ j : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn,
 iterop_fun 0%rig op1
   (λ k : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (mat i k * col_vec x k j)%ring)) = 
col_vec b i
lt: row < i
x0: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
eq: i' = row
(0%rig * col_vec x i' x0)%ring =
(0%rig * col_vec (back_sub_step row mat x b) i' x0)%ring
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
is_ut: is_upper_triangular mat
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
le: i ≥ row
neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
H: (λ j : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn,
 iterop_fun 0%rig op1
   (λ k : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (mat i k * col_vec x k j)%ring)) = 
col_vec b i
lt: row < i
x0: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
eq: i' = row
i > i'
 
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
is_ut: is_upper_triangular mat
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
le: i ≥ row
neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
H: (λ j : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn,
 iterop_fun 0%rig op1
   (λ k : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (mat i k * col_vec x k j)%ring)) = 
col_vec b i
lt: row < i
x0: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
eq: i' = row
i > i'
 
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
is_ut: is_upper_triangular mat
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
le: i ≥ row
neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
H: (λ j : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn,
 iterop_fun 0%rig op1
   (λ k : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (mat i k * col_vec x k j)%ring)) = 
col_vec b i
lt: row < i
x0: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
eq: i' = row
i > row
 assumption. 
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
is_ut: is_upper_triangular mat
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
le: i ≥ row
neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
H: (λ j : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn,
 iterop_fun 0%rig op1
   (λ k : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (mat i k * col_vec x k j)%ring)) = 
col_vec b i
lt: row < i
x0: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
eq: i' = row
(0%rig * col_vec x i' x0)%ring =
(0%rig * col_vec (back_sub_step row mat x b) i' x0)%ring

      
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
is_ut: is_upper_triangular mat
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
le: i ≥ row
neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
H: (λ j : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn,
 iterop_fun 0%rig op1
   (λ k : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (mat i k * col_vec x k j)%ring)) = 
col_vec b i
lt: row < i
x0: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
eq: i' = row
0%rig = 0%rig

      apply idpath.
    
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
is_ut: is_upper_triangular mat
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
le: i ≥ row
neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
H: matrix_mult mat (col_vec x) i = col_vec b i
eq: row = i
matrix_mult mat (col_vec (back_sub_step row mat x b))
  i = matrix_mult mat (col_vec x) i
 
F: fld
n: ℕ
row: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
is_ut: is_upper_triangular mat
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
le: i ≥ row
neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
H: matrix_mult mat (col_vec x) i = col_vec b i
eq: row = i
col_vec b i = matrix_mult mat (col_vec x) i

      now rewrite H.
  Defined.

  (** Back-substituting repeatedly using step procedure defined earlier.
      Carries an additional [row] parameter that allows for partially applying the substition,
      that is used later for showing that diagonal must be non-zero. *)

n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
sep, row: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
Vector F n

F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
sep, row: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
∏ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
i ≥ row
→ col_vec (back_sub_internal mat x b sep row) i =
  col_vec x i

→ col_vec (back_sub_internal mat x b (sep,, p) row) i =

p: 0 < S n

F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
sep: ℕ
p: S sep < S n
row: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
IH: ∏ (p : sep < S n) (i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
i ≥ row
→ col_vec
    (back_sub_internal mat x b (sep,, p) row) i =
  col_vec x i
∏ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
i ≥ row
→ col_vec (back_sub_internal mat x b (S sep,, p) row)
    i = col_vec x i

    
F: fld

x, b: Vector F n

row: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn

i ≥ row
→ col_vec (back_sub_internal mat x b (0,, p) row) i =

 intros i H; now destruct (natchoice0 (S n)) in H. 
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
sep: ℕ
p: S sep < S n
row: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
IH: ∏ (p : sep < S n) (i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
i ≥ row
→ col_vec
    (back_sub_internal mat x b (sep,, p) row) i =
  col_vec x i
∏ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
i ≥ row
→ col_vec (back_sub_internal mat x b (S sep,, p) row)
    i = col_vec x i

    
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
sep: ℕ
p: S sep < S n
row: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
IH: ∏ (p : sep < S n) (i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
i ≥ row
→ col_vec
    (back_sub_internal mat x b (sep,, p) row) i =
  col_vec x i
∏ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
i ≥ row
→ col_vec
    (nat_rect (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
       (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
       (λ (m : ℕ) (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
        (p : S m < S n),
        match
          natlthorgeh (dualelement (m,, p)) row
        with
        | inl _ =>
            back_sub_step (dualelement (m,, p)) mat
              (IH
                 (istransnatlth m (S m) (S n)
                    (natgthsnn m) p)) b
        | inr _ => x
        end) (S sep) p) i = col_vec x i

    
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
sep: ℕ
p: S sep < S n
row: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
IH: ∏ (p : sep < S n) (i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
i ≥ row
→ col_vec
    (back_sub_internal mat x b (sep,, p) row) i =
  col_vec x i
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
i_lt_row: i ≥ row
col_vec
  (nat_rect (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
     (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
     (λ (m : ℕ) (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
      (p : S m < S n),
      match natlthorgeh (dualelement (m,, p)) row with
      | inl _ =>
          back_sub_step (dualelement (m,, p)) mat
            (IH
               (istransnatlth m (S m) (S n)
                  (natgthsnn m) p)) b
      | inr _ => x
      end) (S sep) p) i = col_vec x i

    
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
sep: ℕ
p: S sep < S n
row: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
IH: ∏ (p : sep < S n) (i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
i ≥ row
→ col_vec
    (back_sub_internal mat x b (sep,, p) row) i =
  col_vec x i
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
i_lt_row: i ≥ row
col_vec
  match natlthorgeh (dualelement (sep,, p)) row with
  | inl _ =>
      back_sub_step (dualelement (sep,, p)) mat
        (nat_rect (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
           (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
           (λ (m : ℕ) (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
            (p : S m < S n),
            match
              natlthorgeh (dualelement (m,, p)) row
            with
            | inl _ =>
                back_sub_step (dualelement (m,, p))
                  mat
                  (IH
                     (istransnatlth m (S m) (S n)
                        (natgthsnn m) p)) b
            | inr _ => x
            end) sep
           (istransnatlth sep (S sep) (S n)
              (natgthsnn sep) p)) b
  | inr _ => x
  end i = col_vec x i

    
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
sep: ℕ
p: S sep < S n
row: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
IH: ∏ (p : sep < S n) (i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
i ≥ row
→ col_vec
    (back_sub_internal mat x b (sep,, p) row) i =
  col_vec x i
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
i_lt_row: i ≥ row
lt: dualelement (sep,, p) < row
col_vec
  (back_sub_step (dualelement (sep,, p)) mat
     (nat_rect (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
        (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
        (λ (m : ℕ) (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
         (p : S m < S n),
         match
           natlthorgeh (dualelement (m,, p)) row
         with
         | inl _ =>
             back_sub_step (dualelement (m,, p)) mat
               (IH
                  (istransnatlth m (S m) (S n)
                     (natgthsnn m) p)) b
         | inr _ => x
         end) sep
        (istransnatlth sep (S sep) (S n)
           (natgthsnn sep) p)) b) i = col_vec x i
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
sep: ℕ
p: S sep < S n
row: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
IH: ∏ (p : sep < S n) (i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
i ≥ row
→ col_vec
    (back_sub_internal mat x b (sep,, p) row) i =
  col_vec x i

i_lt_row: i ≥ row
geh: dualelement (sep,, p) ≥ row
col_vec x i = col_vec x i

geh: dualelement (sep,, p) ≥ row
col_vec x i = col_vec x i
reflexivity.

  (back_sub_step (dualelement (sep,, p)) mat
     (nat_rect (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
        (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)

         (p : S m < S n),

         | inr _ => x
         end) sep

           (natgthsnn sep) p)) b) i =

  (back_sub_step (dualelement (sep,, p)) mat
     (nat_rect (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
        (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
        (λ (m : ℕ) (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
         (p : S m < S n),

               (IH
                  (istransnatlth m (S m) (S n)
                     (natgthsnn m) p)) b
         | inr _ => x
         end) sep
        (istransnatlth sep (S sep) (S n)
           (natgthsnn sep) p)) b) i =

F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
sep: ℕ
p: S sep < S n
row: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
IH: ∏ (p : sep < S n) (i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
i ≥ row
→ col_vec
    (back_sub_internal mat x b (sep,, p) row) i =
  col_vec x i
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
i_lt_row: i ≥ row
lt: dualelement (sep,, p) < row
p': sep < S n
col_vec
  (back_sub_step (dualelement (sep,, p)) mat
     (nat_rect (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
        (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
        (λ (m : ℕ) (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
         (p : S m < S n),
         match
           natlthorgeh (dualelement (m,, p)) row
         with
         | inl _ =>
             back_sub_step (dualelement (m,, p)) mat
               (IH
                  (istransnatlth m (S m) (S n)
                     (natgthsnn m) p)) b
         | inr _ => x
         end) sep
        (istransnatlth sep (S sep) (S n)
           (natgthsnn sep) p)) b) i =
col_vec
  (nat_rect (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
     (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
     (λ (m : ℕ) (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
      (p : S m < S n),
      match natlthorgeh (dualelement (m,, p)) row with
      | inl _ =>
          back_sub_step (dualelement (m,, p)) mat
            (IH
               (istransnatlth m (S m) (S n)
                  (natgthsnn m) p)) b
      | inr _ => x

F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
sep: ℕ
p: S sep < S n
row: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
IH: ∏ (p : sep < S n) (i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
i ≥ row
→ col_vec
    (back_sub_internal mat x b (sep,, p) row) i =
  col_vec x i
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
i_lt_row: i ≥ row
lt: dualelement (sep,, p) < row
p': sep < S n
col_vec
  (nat_rect (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
     (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
     (λ (m : ℕ) (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
      (p : S m < S n),
      match natlthorgeh (dualelement (m,, p)) row with
      | inl _ =>
          back_sub_step (dualelement (m,, p)) mat
            (IH
               (istransnatlth m (S m) (S n)
                  (natgthsnn m) p)) b
      | inr _ => x
      end) sep
     (istransnatlth sep (S sep) (S n) (natgthsnn sep)
        p)) i =
col_vec
  (nat_rect (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
     (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
     (λ (m : ℕ) (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
      (p : S m < S n),
      match natlthorgeh (dualelement (m,, p)) row with
      | inl _ =>
          back_sub_step (dualelement (m,, p)) mat
            (IH
               (istransnatlth m (S m) (S n)
                  (natgthsnn m) p)) b
      | inr _ => x
      end) sep p') i
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
sep: ℕ
p: S sep < S n
row: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
IH: ∏ (p : sep < S n) (i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
i ≥ row
→ col_vec
    (back_sub_internal mat x b (sep,, p) row) i =
  col_vec x i
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
i_lt_row: i ≥ row
lt: dualelement (sep,, p) < row
p': sep < S n
i ≠ dualelement (sep,, p)

     (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)

col_vec
  (nat_rect (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
     (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
     (λ (m : ℕ) (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
      (p : S m < S n),
      match natlthorgeh (dualelement (m,, p)) row with
      | inl _ =>

            (IH
               (istransnatlth m (S m) (S n)
                  (natgthsnn m) p)) b
      | inr _ => x
      end) sep p') i
apply maponpaths_2, maponpaths, proofirrelevance, propproperty.

F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
sep, row: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
∏ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
i ≥ dualelement sep
→ mat i i != 0%ring
  → i < row
    → matrix_mult mat
        (col_vec (back_sub_internal mat x b sep row))
        i = col_vec b i

n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
sep, row: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn

F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
sep, row: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
i_le_sep: i ≥ dualelement sep
neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
lt: i < row
matrix_mult mat
  (col_vec
     (nat_rect (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
        (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
        (λ (m : ℕ) (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
         (p : S m < S n),
         match
           natlthorgeh (dualelement (m,, p)) row
         with
         | inl _ =>
             back_sub_step (dualelement (m,, p)) mat
               (IH
                  (istransnatlth m (S m) (S n)
                     (natgthsnn m) p)) b
         | inr _ => x
         end) (pr1 sep) (pr2 sep))) i = col_vec b i

F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
sep: ℕ
p: S sep < S n
row: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
i_le_sep: i ≥ dualelement (S sep,, p)
neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
lt: i < row
IH: ∏ p : sep < S n,
i ≥ dualelement (sep,, p)
→ matrix_mult mat
    (col_vec
       (nat_rect
          (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
          (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
          (λ (m : ℕ) (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
           (p0 : S m < S n),
           match
             natlthorgeh 
               (dualelement (m,, p0)) row
           with
           | inl _ =>
               back_sub_step
                 (dualelement (m,, p0)) mat
                 (IH
                    (istransnatlth m 
                      (S m) 
                      (S n) 
                      (natgthsnn m) p0)) b
           | inr _ => x
           end) sep p)) i = 
  col_vec b i

  (col_vec

        (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)

                  (istransnatlth m 
                     (S m) 
                     (S n) 
                     (natgthsnn m) p)) b
         | inr _ => x
         end) (S sep) p)) i = 
col_vec b i

n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n

ut: is_upper_triangular mat
sep: ℕ
p: S sep < S n
row: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn

i_le_sep: i ≥ dualelement (S sep,, p)
neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
lt: i < row
IH: ∏ p : sep < S n,
i ≥ dualelement (sep,, p)
→ matrix_mult mat
    (col_vec
       (nat_rect
          (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
          (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
          (λ (m : ℕ) (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
           (p0 : S m < S n),
           match
             natlthorgeh 
               (dualelement (m,, p0)) row
           with
           | inl _ =>
               back_sub_step
                 (dualelement (m,, p0)) mat
                 (IH

                      (S m) 
                      (S n) 
                      (natgthsnn m) p0)) b
           | inr _ => x

leh: dualelement (sep,, p) < i
matrix_mult mat
  (col_vec
     match
       natlthorgeh (dualelement (sep,, p)) row
     with
     | inl _ =>
         back_sub_step 
           (dualelement (sep,, p)) mat
           (nat_rect
              (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
              (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
              (λ (m : ℕ) 
               (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
               (p : S m < S n),
               match
                 natlthorgeh (dualelement (m,, p)) row
               with
               | inl _ =>
                   back_sub_step 
                     (dualelement (m,, p)) mat
                     (IH
                      (istransnatlth m 
                      (S m) 
                      (S n) 
                      (natgthsnn m) p)) b
               | inr _ => x
               end) sep
              (istransnatlth sep 
                 (S sep) 
                 (S n) 
                 (natgthsnn sep) p)) b
     | inr _ => x
     end) i = col_vec b i
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
sep: ℕ
p: S sep < S n
row: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
i_le_sep: i ≥ dualelement (S sep,, p)
neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
lt: i < row
IH: ∏ p : sep < S n,
i ≥ dualelement (sep,, p)
→ matrix_mult mat
    (col_vec
       (nat_rect
          (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
          (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
          (λ (m : ℕ) (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
           (p0 : S m < S n),
           match
             natlthorgeh 
               (dualelement (m,, p0)) row
           with
           | inl _ =>
               back_sub_step
                 (dualelement (m,, p0)) mat
                 (IH
                    (istransnatlth m 
                      (S m) 
                      (S n) 
                      (natgthsnn m) p0)) b
           | inr _ => x
           end) sep p)) i = 
  col_vec b i
eq: dualelement (sep,, p) = i
matrix_mult mat
  (col_vec
     match
       natlthorgeh (dualelement (sep,, p)) row
     with
     | inl _ =>
         back_sub_step 
           (dualelement (sep,, p)) mat
           (nat_rect
              (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
              (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
              (λ (m : ℕ) 
               (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
               (p : S m < S n),
               match
                 natlthorgeh (dualelement (m,, p)) row
               with
               | inl _ =>
                   back_sub_step 
                     (dualelement (m,, p)) mat
                     (IH
                      (istransnatlth m 
                      (S m) 
                      (S n) 
                      (natgthsnn m) p)) b
               | inr _ => x
               end) sep
              (istransnatlth sep 
                 (S sep) 
                 (S n) 
                 (natgthsnn sep) p)) b
     | inr _ => x
     end) i = col_vec b i

    
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
sep: ℕ
p: S sep < S n
row: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
i_le_sep: i ≥ dualelement (S sep,, p)
neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
lt: i < row
IH: ∏ p : sep < S n,
i ≥ dualelement (sep,, p)
→ matrix_mult mat
    (col_vec
       (nat_rect
          (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
          (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
          (λ (m : ℕ) (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
           (p0 : S m < S n),
           match
             natlthorgeh 
               (dualelement (m,, p0)) row
           with
           | inl _ =>
               back_sub_step
                 (dualelement (m,, p0)) mat
                 (IH
                    (istransnatlth m 
                      (S m) 
                      (S n) 
                      (natgthsnn m) p0)) b
           | inr _ => x
           end) sep p)) i = 
  col_vec b i
dualelement (sep,, p) ≤ i
 
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
sep: ℕ
p: S sep < S n
row: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
i_le_sep: i ≥ dualelement (S sep,, p)
neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
lt: i < row
IH: ∏ p : sep < S n,
i ≥ dualelement (sep,, p)
→ matrix_mult mat
    (col_vec
       (nat_rect
          (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
          (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
          (λ (m : ℕ) (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
           (p0 : S m < S n),
           match
             natlthorgeh 
               (dualelement (m,, p0)) row
           with
           | inl _ =>
               back_sub_step
                 (dualelement (m,, p0)) mat
                 (IH
                    (istransnatlth m 
                      (S m) 
                      (S n) 
                      (natgthsnn m) p0)) b
           | inr _ => x
           end) sep p)) i = 
  col_vec b i
dualelement (sep,, p) ≤ dualelement (S sep,, p)

      now apply (@dualelement_sn_le). 
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
sep: ℕ
p: S sep < S n
row: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
i_le_sep: i ≥ dualelement (S sep,, p)
neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
lt: i < row
IH: ∏ p : sep < S n,
i ≥ dualelement (sep,, p)
→ matrix_mult mat
    (col_vec
       (nat_rect
          (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
          (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
          (λ (m : ℕ) (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
           (p0 : S m < S n),
           match
             natlthorgeh 
               (dualelement (m,, p0)) row
           with
           | inl _ =>
               back_sub_step
                 (dualelement (m,, p0)) mat
                 (IH
                    (istransnatlth m 
                      (S m) 
                      (S n) 
                      (natgthsnn m) p0)) b
           | inr _ => x
           end) sep p)) i = 
  col_vec b i
leh: dualelement (sep,, p) < i
matrix_mult mat
  (col_vec
     match
       natlthorgeh (dualelement (sep,, p)) row
     with
     | inl _ =>
         back_sub_step (dualelement (sep,, p)) mat
           (nat_rect
              (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
              (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
              (λ (m : ℕ) (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
               (p : S m < S n),
               match
                 natlthorgeh (dualelement (m,, p)) row
               with
               | inl _ =>
                   back_sub_step (dualelement (m,, p))
                     mat
                     (IH
                        (istransnatlth m (S m) (S n)
                           (natgthsnn m) p)) b
               | inr _ => x
               end) sep
              (istransnatlth sep (S sep) (S n)
                 (natgthsnn sep) p)) b
     | inr _ => x
     end) i = col_vec b i
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
sep: ℕ
p: S sep < S n
row: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn

neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
lt: i < row
IH: ∏ p : sep < S n,
i ≥ dualelement (sep,, p)
→ matrix_mult mat
    (col_vec
       (nat_rect
          (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
          (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
          (λ (m : ℕ) (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
           (p0 : S m < S n),
           match
             natlthorgeh 
               (dualelement (m,, p0)) row
           with
           | inl _ =>
               back_sub_step
                 (dualelement (m,, p0)) mat
                 (IH
                    (istransnatlth m 
                      (S m) 
                      (S n) 
                      (natgthsnn m) p0)) b
           | inr _ => x
           end) sep p)) i = 
  col_vec b i
eq: dualelement (sep,, p) = i
matrix_mult mat
  (col_vec
     match
       natlthorgeh (dualelement (sep,, p)) row
     with
     | inl _ =>
         back_sub_step 
           (dualelement (sep,, p)) mat
           (nat_rect
              (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
              (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
              (λ (m : ℕ) 
               (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
               (p : S m < S n),
               match
                 natlthorgeh (dualelement (m,, p)) row
               with
               | inl _ =>
                   back_sub_step 
                     (dualelement (m,, p)) mat
                     (IH
                      (istransnatlth m 
                      (S m) 
                      (S n) 
                      (natgthsnn m) p)) b
               | inr _ => x
               end) sep
              (istransnatlth sep 
                 (S sep) 
                 (S n) 
                 (natgthsnn sep) p)) b
     | inr _ => x
     end) i = col_vec b i

n: ℕ

ut: is_upper_triangular mat

lt: i < row

i ≥ dualelement (sep,, p)

    (col_vec
       (nat_rect
          (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
          (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
          (λ (m : ℕ) (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
           (p0 : S m < S n),

           | inr _ => x
           end) sep p)) i =

leh: dualelement (sep,, p) < i
contr_geh: dualelement (sep,, p) ≥ row
matrix_mult mat (col_vec x) i = col_vec b i

              (natlthlehtrans _ _ _ (istransnatlth _ _ _ leh lt) contr_geh)).

n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n

ut: is_upper_triangular mat
sep: ℕ

neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
lt: i < row
IH: ∏ p : sep < S n,
i ≥ dualelement (sep,, p)
→ matrix_mult mat
    (col_vec
       (nat_rect
          (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
          (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
          (λ (m : ℕ) (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
           (p0 : S m < S n),
           match
             natlthorgeh 
               (dualelement (m,, p0)) row
           with
           | inl _ =>
               back_sub_step
                 (dualelement (m,, p0)) mat
                 (IH
                    (istransnatlth m 
                      (S m) 
                      (S n) 
                      (natgthsnn m) p0)) b
           | inr _ => x
           end) sep p)) i =

F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
sep: ℕ
p: S sep < S n
row: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
i_le_sep: i ≥ dualelement (S sep,, p)
neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
lt: i < row
IH: ∏ p : sep < S n,
i ≥ dualelement (sep,, p)
→ matrix_mult mat
    (col_vec
       (nat_rect
          (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
          (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
          (λ (m : ℕ) (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
           (p0 : S m < S n),
           match
             natlthorgeh 
               (dualelement (m,, p0)) row
           with
           | inl _ =>
               back_sub_step
                 (dualelement (m,, p0)) mat
                 (IH
                    (istransnatlth m 
                      (S m) 
                      (S n) 
                      (natgthsnn m) p0)) b
           | inr _ => x
           end) sep p)) i = 
  col_vec b i
leh: dualelement (sep,, p) < i
h: dualelement (sep,, p) < row
i
≥ coprod_rect (λ _ : (0 = n) ⨿ (0 < n), (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
    (λ H : 0 = n,
     make_stn n (n - 1 - (sep,, p))
       (fromempty
          (StandardFiniteSets.dualelement_0_empty
             (sep,, p) H)))
    (λ H : 0 < n,
     make_stn n (n - 1 - (sep,, p))
       (StandardFiniteSets.dualelement_lt (sep,, p) n
          H)) (natchoice0 n)
 
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
sep: ℕ
p: S sep < S n
row: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
i_le_sep: i ≥ dualelement (S sep,, p)
neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
lt: i < row
IH: ∏ p : sep < S n,
i ≥ dualelement (sep,, p)
→ matrix_mult mat
    (col_vec
       (nat_rect
          (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
          (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
          (λ (m : ℕ) (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
           (p0 : S m < S n),
           match
             natlthorgeh 
               (dualelement (m,, p0)) row
           with
           | inl _ =>
               back_sub_step
                 (dualelement (m,, p0)) mat
                 (IH
                    (istransnatlth m 
                      (S m) 
                      (S n) 
                      (natgthsnn m) p0)) b
           | inr _ => x
           end) sep p)) i = 
  col_vec b i
leh: coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (0 = n) ⨿ (0 < n), (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
  (λ H : 0 = n,
   make_stn n (n - 1 - (sep,, p))
     (fromempty
        (StandardFiniteSets.dualelement_0_empty
           (sep,, p) H)))
  (λ H : 0 < n,
   make_stn n (n - 1 - (sep,, p))
     (StandardFiniteSets.dualelement_lt
        (sep,, p) n H)) 
  (natchoice0 n) < i
h: dualelement (sep,, p) < row
i
≥ coprod_rect (λ _ : (0 = n) ⨿ (0 < n), (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
    (λ H : 0 = n,
     make_stn n (n - 1 - (sep,, p))
       (fromempty
          (StandardFiniteSets.dualelement_0_empty
             (sep,, p) H)))
    (λ H : 0 < n,
     make_stn n (n - 1 - (sep,, p))
       (StandardFiniteSets.dualelement_lt (sep,, p) n
          H)) (natchoice0 n)

        
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
sep: ℕ
p: S sep < S n
row: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
i_le_sep: i ≥ dualelement (S sep,, p)
neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
lt: i < row
IH: ∏ p : sep < S n,
i ≥ dualelement (sep,, p)
→ matrix_mult mat
    (col_vec
       (nat_rect
          (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
          (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
          (λ (m : ℕ) (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
           (p0 : S m < S n),
           match
             natlthorgeh 
               (dualelement (m,, p0)) row
           with
           | inl _ =>
               back_sub_step
                 (dualelement (m,, p0)) mat
                 (IH
                    (istransnatlth m 
                      (S m) 
                      (S n) 
                      (natgthsnn m) p0)) b
           | inr _ => x
           end) sep p)) i = 
  col_vec b i
contr_eq: 0 = n
leh: coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (0 = n) ⨿ (0 < n), (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
  (λ H : 0 = n,
   make_stn n (n - 1 - (sep,, p))
     (fromempty
        (StandardFiniteSets.dualelement_0_empty
           (sep,, p) H)))
  (λ H : 0 < n,
   make_stn n (n - 1 - (sep,, p))
     (StandardFiniteSets.dualelement_lt
        (sep,, p) n H)) 
  (inl contr_eq) < i
h: dualelement (sep,, p) < row
i
≥ coprod_rect (λ _ : (0 = n) ⨿ (0 < n), (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
    (λ H : 0 = n,
     make_stn n (n - 1 - (sep,, p))
       (fromempty
          (StandardFiniteSets.dualelement_0_empty
             (sep,, p) H)))
    (λ H : 0 < n,
     make_stn n (n - 1 - (sep,, p))
       (StandardFiniteSets.dualelement_lt (sep,, p) n
          H)) (inl contr_eq)
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
sep: ℕ
p: S sep < S n
row: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
i_le_sep: i ≥ dualelement (S sep,, p)
neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
lt: i < row
IH: ∏ p : sep < S n,
i ≥ dualelement (sep,, p)
→ matrix_mult mat
    (col_vec
       (nat_rect
          (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
          (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
          (λ (m : ℕ) (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
           (p0 : S m < S n),
           match
             natlthorgeh 
               (dualelement (m,, p0)) row
           with
           | inl _ =>
               back_sub_step
                 (dualelement (m,, p0)) mat
                 (IH
                    (istransnatlth m 
                      (S m) 
                      (S n) 
                      (natgthsnn m) p0)) b
           | inr _ => x
           end) sep p)) i = 
  col_vec b i
h0: 0 < n
leh: coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (0 = n) ⨿ (0 < n), (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
  (λ H : 0 = n,
   make_stn n (n - 1 - (sep,, p))
     (fromempty
        (StandardFiniteSets.dualelement_0_empty
           (sep,, p) H)))
  (λ H : 0 < n,
   make_stn n (n - 1 - (sep,, p))
     (StandardFiniteSets.dualelement_lt
        (sep,, p) n H)) 
  (inr h0) < i
h: dualelement (sep,, p) < row
i
≥ coprod_rect (λ _ : (0 = n) ⨿ (0 < n), (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
    (λ H : 0 = n,
     make_stn n (n - 1 - (sep,, p))
       (fromempty
          (StandardFiniteSets.dualelement_0_empty
             (sep,, p) H)))
    (λ H : 0 < n,
     make_stn n (n - 1 - (sep,, p))
       (StandardFiniteSets.dualelement_lt 
          (sep,, p) n H)) 
    (inr h0)

        
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
sep: ℕ
p: S sep < S n
row: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
i_le_sep: i ≥ dualelement (S sep,, p)
neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
lt: i < row
IH: ∏ p : sep < S n,
i ≥ dualelement (sep,, p)
→ matrix_mult mat
    (col_vec
       (nat_rect
          (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
          (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
          (λ (m : ℕ) (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
           (p0 : S m < S n),
           match
             natlthorgeh 
               (dualelement (m,, p0)) row
           with
           | inl _ =>
               back_sub_step
                 (dualelement (m,, p0)) mat
                 (IH
                    (istransnatlth m 
                      (S m) 
                      (S n) 
                      (natgthsnn m) p0)) b
           | inr _ => x
           end) sep p)) i = 
  col_vec b i
contr_eq: 0 = n
leh: coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (0 = n) ⨿ (0 < n), (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
  (λ H : 0 = n,
   make_stn n (n - 1 - (sep,, p))
     (fromempty
        (StandardFiniteSets.dualelement_0_empty
           (sep,, p) H)))
  (λ H : 0 < n,
   make_stn n (n - 1 - (sep,, p))
     (StandardFiniteSets.dualelement_lt
        (sep,, p) n H)) 
  (inl contr_eq) < i
h: dualelement (sep,, p) < row
i
≥ coprod_rect (λ _ : (0 = n) ⨿ (0 < n), (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
    (λ H : 0 = n,
     make_stn n (n - 1 - (sep,, p))
       (fromempty
          (StandardFiniteSets.dualelement_0_empty
             (sep,, p) H)))
    (λ H : 0 < n,
     make_stn n (n - 1 - (sep,, p))
       (StandardFiniteSets.dualelement_lt (sep,, p) n
          H)) (inl contr_eq)

n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
sep: ℕ
p: S sep < S n
row: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn

neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
lt: i < row
IH: ∏ p : sep < S n,
i ≥ dualelement (sep,, p)
→ matrix_mult mat
    (col_vec
       (nat_rect
          (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
          (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
          (λ (m : ℕ) (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
           (p0 : S m < S n),
           match
             natlthorgeh 
               (dualelement (m,, p0)) row
           with
           | inl _ =>
               back_sub_step
                 (dualelement (m,, p0)) mat
                 (IH

contr_eq: 0 = n
leh: coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (0 = n) ⨿ (0 < n), (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
  (λ H : 0 = n,
   make_stn n (n - 1 - (sep,, p))
     (fromempty
        (StandardFiniteSets.dualelement_0_empty
           (sep,, p) H)))
  (λ H : 0 < n,
   make_stn n (n - 1 - (sep,, p))
     (StandardFiniteSets.dualelement_lt
        (sep,, p) n H)) 
  (inl contr_eq) < i
h: dualelement (sep,, p) < row
(⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn
 now rewrite contr_eq.

F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
sep: ℕ
p: S sep < S n
row: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
i_le_sep: i ≥ dualelement (S sep,, p)
neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
lt: i < row
IH: ∏ p : sep < S n,
i ≥ dualelement (sep,, p)
→ matrix_mult mat
    (col_vec
       (nat_rect
          (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
          (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
          (λ (m : ℕ) (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
           (p0 : S m < S n),
           match
             natlthorgeh 
               (dualelement (m,, p0)) row
           with
           | inl _ =>
               back_sub_step
                 (dualelement (m,, p0)) mat
                 (IH
                    (istransnatlth m 
                      (S m) 
                      (S n) 
                      (natgthsnn m) p0)) b
           | inr _ => x
           end) sep p)) i = 
  col_vec b i
leh: dualelement (sep,, p) < i
h: dualelement (sep,, p) < row
matrix_mult mat
  (col_vec
     (nat_rect (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
        (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
        (λ (m : ℕ) (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
         (p : S m < S n),
         match
           natlthorgeh (dualelement (m,, p)) row
         with
         | inl _ =>
             back_sub_step (dualelement (m,, p)) mat
               (IH
                  (istransnatlth m (S m) (S n)
                     (natgthsnn m) p)) b
         | inr _ => x
         end) sep
        (istransnatlth sep (S sep) (S n)
           (natgthsnn sep) p))) i = col_vec b i

      
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
sep: ℕ

row: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn

i_le_sep: i ≥ dualelement (S sep,, p)
neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
lt: i < row
IH: ∏ p : sep < S n,
i ≥ dualelement (sep,, p)
→ matrix_mult mat
    (col_vec
       (nat_rect
          (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
          (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
          (λ (m : ℕ) (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
           (p0 : S m < S n),
           match
             natlthorgeh 
               (dualelement (m,, p0)) row
           with
           | inl _ =>
               back_sub_step
                 (dualelement (m,, p0)) mat
                 (IH
                    (istransnatlth m 
                      (S m) 
                      (S n) 
                      (natgthsnn m) p0)) b
           | inr _ => x
           end) sep p)) i = 
  col_vec b i
leh: dualelement (sep,, p) < i
h: dualelement (sep,, p) < row
i
≥ dualelement
    (sep,,
     istransnatlth sep (S sep) (S n) (natgthsnn sep) p)

        now apply dualelement_lt_to_le_s.
    
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
sep: ℕ
p: S sep < S n
row: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
i_le_sep: i ≥ dualelement (S sep,, p)
neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
lt: i < row
IH: ∏ p : sep < S n,
i ≥ dualelement (sep,, p)
→ matrix_mult mat
    (col_vec
       (nat_rect
          (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
          (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
          (λ (m : ℕ) (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
           (p0 : S m < S n),
           match
             natlthorgeh 
               (dualelement (m,, p0)) row
           with
           | inl _ =>
               back_sub_step
                 (dualelement (m,, p0)) mat
                 (IH
                    (istransnatlth m 
                      (S m) 
                      (S n) 
                      (natgthsnn m) p0)) b
           | inr _ => x
           end) sep p)) i = 
  col_vec b i
eq: dualelement (sep,, p) = i
matrix_mult mat
  (col_vec
     match
       natlthorgeh (dualelement (sep,, p)) row
     with
     | inl _ =>
         back_sub_step (dualelement (sep,, p)) mat
           (nat_rect
              (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
              (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
              (λ (m : ℕ) (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
               (p : S m < S n),
               match
                 natlthorgeh (dualelement (m,, p)) row
               with
               | inl _ =>
                   back_sub_step (dualelement (m,, p))
                     mat
                     (IH
                        (istransnatlth m (S m) (S n)
                           (natgthsnn m) p)) b
               | inr _ => x
               end) sep
              (istransnatlth sep (S sep) (S n)
                 (natgthsnn sep) p)) b
     | inr _ => x
     end) i = col_vec b i
 
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
sep: ℕ
p: S sep < S n
row: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
i_le_sep: i ≥ dualelement (S sep,, p)
neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
lt: i < row
IH: ∏ p : sep < S n,
i ≥ dualelement (sep,, p)
→ matrix_mult mat
    (col_vec
       (nat_rect
          (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
          (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
          (λ (m : ℕ) (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
           (p0 : S m < S n),
           match
             natlthorgeh 
               (dualelement (m,, p0)) row
           with
           | inl _ =>
               back_sub_step
                 (dualelement (m,, p0)) mat
                 (IH
                    (istransnatlth m 
                      (S m) 
                      (S n) 
                      (natgthsnn m) p0)) b
           | inr _ => x
           end) sep p)) i = 
  col_vec b i
eq: dualelement (sep,, p) = i
h: dualelement (sep,, p) < row
matrix_mult mat
  (col_vec
     (back_sub_step (dualelement (sep,, p)) mat
        (nat_rect (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
           (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
           (λ (m : ℕ) (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
            (p : S m < S n),
            match
              natlthorgeh (dualelement (m,, p)) row
            with
            | inl _ =>
                back_sub_step (dualelement (m,, p))
                  mat
                  (IH
                     (istransnatlth m (S m) (S n)
                        (natgthsnn m) p)) b
            | inr _ => x
            end) sep
           (istransnatlth sep (S sep) (S n)
              (natgthsnn sep) p)) b)) i = col_vec b i
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
sep: ℕ
p: S sep < S n
row: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
i_le_sep: i ≥ dualelement (S sep,, p)
neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
lt: i < row
IH: ∏ p : sep < S n,
i ≥ dualelement (sep,, p)
→ matrix_mult mat
    (col_vec
       (nat_rect
          (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
          (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
          (λ (m : ℕ) (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
           (p0 : S m < S n),
           match
             natlthorgeh 
               (dualelement (m,, p0)) row
           with
           | inl _ =>
               back_sub_step
                 (dualelement (m,, p0)) mat
                 (IH
                    (istransnatlth m 
                      (S m) 
                      (S n) 
                      (natgthsnn m) p0)) b
           | inr _ => x
           end) sep p)) i = 
  col_vec b i
eq: dualelement (sep,, p) = i
contr_geh: dualelement (sep,, p) ≥ row
matrix_mult mat (col_vec x) i = col_vec b i

      
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
sep: ℕ
p: S sep < S n

neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
lt: i < row
