i ≥ dualelement (sep,, p)
→ matrix_mult mat
    (col_vec
       (nat_rect
          (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
          (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
          (λ (m : ℕ) (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
           (p0 : S m < S n),
           match
             natlthorgeh 
               (dualelement (m,, p0)) row
           with
           | inl _ =>
               back_sub_step
                 (dualelement (m,, p0)) mat
                 (IH
                    (istransnatlth m 
                      (S m) 
                      (S n) 
                      (natgthsnn m) p0)) b
           | inr _ => x
           end) sep p)) i = 
  col_vec b i
eq: dualelement (sep,, p) = i
h: dualelement (sep,, p) < row
matrix_mult mat
  (col_vec
     (back_sub_step (dualelement (sep,, p)) mat
        (nat_rect (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
           (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
           (λ (m : ℕ) (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
            (p : S m < S n),
            match
              natlthorgeh (dualelement (m,, p)) row
            with
            | inl _ =>
                back_sub_step (dualelement (m,, p))
                  mat
                  (IH
                     (istransnatlth m (S m) (S n)
                        (natgthsnn m) p)) b
            | inr _ => x
            end) sep
           (istransnatlth sep (S sep) (S n)
              (natgthsnn sep) p)) b)) i = col_vec b i
 
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
sep: ℕ
p: S sep < S n
row: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
i_le_sep: i ≥ dualelement (S sep,, p)
neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
lt: i < row
IH: ∏ p : sep < S n,
i ≥ dualelement (sep,, p)
→ matrix_mult mat
    (col_vec
       (nat_rect
          (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
          (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
          (λ (m : ℕ) (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
           (p0 : S m < S n),
           match
             natlthorgeh 
               (dualelement (m,, p0)) row
           with
           | inl _ =>
               back_sub_step
                 (dualelement (m,, p0)) mat
                 (IH
                    (istransnatlth m 
                      (S m) 
                      (S n) 
                      (natgthsnn m) p0)) b
           | inr _ => x
           end) sep p)) i = 
  col_vec b i
eq: dualelement (sep,, p) = i
h: dualelement (sep,, p) < row
matrix_mult mat
  (col_vec
     (back_sub_step i mat
        (nat_rect (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
           (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
           (λ (m : ℕ) (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
            (p : S m < S n),
            match
              natlthorgeh (dualelement (m,, p)) row
            with
            | inl _ =>
                back_sub_step (dualelement (m,, p))
                  mat
                  (IH
                     (istransnatlth m (S m) (S n)
                        (natgthsnn m) p)) b
            | inr _ => x
            end) sep
           (istransnatlth sep (S sep) (S n)
              (natgthsnn sep) p)) b)) i = col_vec b i

        now rewrite back_sub_step_inv0.
      
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
sep: ℕ
p: S sep < S n
row: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
i_le_sep: i ≥ dualelement (S sep,, p)
neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
lt: i < row
IH: ∏ p : sep < S n,
i ≥ dualelement (sep,, p)
→ matrix_mult mat
    (col_vec
       (nat_rect
          (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
          (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
          (λ (m : ℕ) (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
           (p0 : S m < S n),
           match
             natlthorgeh 
               (dualelement (m,, p0)) row
           with
           | inl _ =>
               back_sub_step
                 (dualelement (m,, p0)) mat
                 (IH
                    (istransnatlth m 
                      (S m) 
                      (S n) 
                      (natgthsnn m) p0)) b
           | inr _ => x
           end) sep p)) i = 
  col_vec b i
eq: dualelement (sep,, p) = i
contr_geh: dualelement (sep,, p) ≥ row
matrix_mult mat (col_vec x) i = col_vec b i
 
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
x, b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
sep: ℕ
p: S sep < S n
row: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
i_le_sep: i ≥ dualelement (S sep,, p)
neq0: mat i i != 0%ring
lt: dualelement (sep,, p) < row
IH: ∏ p : sep < S n,
i ≥ dualelement (sep,, p)
→ matrix_mult mat
    (col_vec
       (nat_rect
          (λ sep : ℕ, sep < S n → Vector F n)
          (λ _ : 0 < S n, x)
          (λ (m : ℕ) (IH : m < S n → Vector F n)
           (p0 : S m < S n),
           match
             natlthorgeh 
               (dualelement (m,, p0)) row
           with
           | inl _ =>
               back_sub_step
                 (dualelement (m,, p0)) mat
                 (IH
                    (istransnatlth m 
                      (S m) 
                      (S n) 
                      (natgthsnn m) p0)) b
           | inr _ => x
           end) sep p)) i = 
  col_vec b i
eq: dualelement (sep,, p) = i
contr_geh: dualelement (sep,, p) ≥ row
matrix_mult mat (col_vec x) i = col_vec b i

        contradiction (isirreflnatlth _ (natlthlehtrans _ _ _ lt contr_geh)).
  Defined.

  Definition back_sub
    {n : nat}
    (mat : Matrix F n n)
    (vec : Vector F n)
  := back_sub_internal mat vec vec (n,, natgthsnn _) (n,, natgthsnn _).

  
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
df: diagonal_all_nonzero mat
back_sub_stmt mat b ut df

  
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
df: diagonal_all_nonzero mat
back_sub_stmt mat b ut df

    
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
df: diagonal_all_nonzero mat
matrix_mult mat (col_vec (back_sub mat b)) = col_vec b

    
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
df: diagonal_all_nonzero mat
matrix_mult mat
  (col_vec
     (back_sub_internal mat b b (n,, natgthsnn n)
        (n,, natgthsnn n))) = col_vec b

    
F: fld

mat: Matrix F n n
b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
df: diagonal_all_nonzero mat
eq0: 0 = n
matrix_mult mat
  (col_vec
     (back_sub_internal mat b b (n,, natgthsnn n)
        (n,, natgthsnn n))) = col_vec b

i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
(⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn
 now rewrite eq0. 
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
df: diagonal_all_nonzero mat

F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
df: diagonal_all_nonzero mat
h: 0 < n
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn

F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
df: diagonal_all_nonzero mat
h: 0 < n
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
i
≥ coprod_rect
    (λ _ : (0 = S n) ⨿ (0 < S n), (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn)
    (λ H : 0 = S n,
     make_stn (S n) (S n - 1 - (n,, natgthsnn n))
       (fromempty
          (StandardFiniteSets.dualelement_0_empty
             (n,, natgthsnn n) H)))
    (λ H : 0 < S n,
     make_stn (S n) (S n - 1 - (n,, natgthsnn n))
       (StandardFiniteSets.dualelement_lt
          (n,, natgthsnn n) (S n) H))
    (natchoice0 (S n))
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
b: Vector F n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
df: diagonal_all_nonzero mat
h: 0 < n
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
i < n,, natgthsnn n

ut: is_upper_triangular mat
df: diagonal_all_nonzero mat
h: 0 < n

i < n,, natgthsnn n
exact (pr2 i).

     make_stn (S n) (S n - 1 - (n,, natgthsnn n))
       (StandardFiniteSets.dualelement_lt
          (n,, natgthsnn n) (S n) H)) (inl eq0)

n: ℕ

b: Vector F n

       (StandardFiniteSets.dualelement_lt

    simpl; now rewrite natminuseqn, minuseq0'.
  Defined.

End BackSub.


Section BackSubZero.

  (** First, Helper functions for finding first zero value in a vector.
      Then proof we can't have invertible, upper triangular matrix unless
      non-zero diagonal *)

  Context (F : fld).

  Local Notation Σ := (iterop_fun (@ringunel1 F) op1).
  Local Notation "A ** B" := (@matrix_mult F _ _ A _ B) (at level 40, left associativity).
  Local Notation "R1 *pw R2" := ((pointwise _ op2) R1 R2) (at level 40, left associativity).
  Local Notation "0" := (@rigunel1 F).

  (* For using nonzeroax *)
  
F: fld
e: F
F

  
F: fld
e: F
F

  
F: fld
e: F
p: e = 0%ring
F
F: fld
e: F
n: e != 0%ring
F

  
F: fld
e: F
p: e = 0%ring
F
 exact 1%ring.
  
F: fld
e: F
n: e != 0%ring
F
 exact 0%ring.
  Defined.

  Local Definition flip_fld_bin_vec
  {n : nat} (v : Vector F n) := λ i : (stn n), flip_fld_bin (v i).

  (* Below, we find the first zero value in a vector [v] by looking for the leading element
     in the transformed vector. Perhaps not a pretty solution, maybe we instead want to generalize
     the notion of leading entry. *)

  
F: fld
n: ℕ
v: Vector F n
(∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, v j != 0%ring)
⨿ (∑ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   v i = 0%ring
   × (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, j < pr1 i → v j != 0%ring))

  
F: fld
n: ℕ
v: Vector F n
(∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, v j != 0%ring)
⨿ (∑ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   v i = 0%ring
   × (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, j < pr1 i → v j != 0%ring))

  
F: fld
n: ℕ
v: Vector F n
leading_entry:= leading_entry_compute F
  (flip_fld_bin_vec v): Maybe.maybe (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
(∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, v j != 0%ring)
⨿ (∑ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   v i = 0%ring
   × (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, j < pr1 i → v j != 0%ring))

  
F: fld
n: ℕ
v: Vector F n
leading_entry:= leading_entry_compute F
  (flip_fld_bin_vec v): Maybe.maybe (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
some: ∑ x : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, leading_entry = Maybe.just x
(∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, v j != 0%ring)
⨿ (∑ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   v i = 0%ring
   × (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, j < pr1 i → v j != 0%ring))

v: Vector F n
leading_entry:= leading_entry_compute F
  (flip_fld_bin_vec v): Maybe.maybe (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
none: leading_entry = Maybe.nothing
(∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, v j != 0%ring)
⨿ (∑ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   v i = 0%ring
   × (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, j < pr1 i → v j != 0%ring))

some: ∑ x : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, leading_entry = Maybe.just x
(∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, v j != 0%ring)
⨿ (∑ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   v i = 0%ring
   × (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, j < pr1 i → v j != 0%ring))

leading_entry:= leading_entry_compute F
  (flip_fld_bin_vec v): Maybe.maybe (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
some: ∑ x : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, leading_entry = Maybe.just x
(⟦ n ⟧)%stn
F: fld
n: ℕ
v: Vector F n
leading_entry:= leading_entry_compute F
  (flip_fld_bin_vec v): Maybe.maybe (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
some: ∑ x : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, leading_entry = Maybe.just x
v ?Goal0 = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   natgtb (pr1 ?Goal0) j = true → v j != 0%ring)
 
F: fld
n: ℕ
v: Vector F n
leading_entry:= leading_entry_compute F
  (flip_fld_bin_vec v): Maybe.maybe (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
some: ∑ x : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, leading_entry = Maybe.just x
(⟦ n ⟧)%stn
apply some. 
F: fld
n: ℕ
v: Vector F n
leading_entry:= leading_entry_compute F
  (flip_fld_bin_vec v): Maybe.maybe (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
some: ∑ x : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, leading_entry = Maybe.just x
v (let X := pr1 some in X) = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   natgtb (pr1 (let X := pr1 some in X)) j = true
   → v j != 0%ring)

    
F: fld
n: ℕ
v: Vector F n
leading_entry:= leading_entry_compute F
  (flip_fld_bin_vec v): Maybe.maybe (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
some: ∑ x : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, leading_entry = Maybe.just x
some_neq_0: flip_fld_bin_vec v (pr1 some) != 0%ring
prev_eq_0: ∏ i_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
i_2 < pr1 some
→ flip_fld_bin_vec v i_2 = 0%ring
v (let X := pr1 some in X) = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   natgtb (pr1 (let X := pr1 some in X)) j = true
   → v j != 0%ring)

    
F: fld
n: ℕ
v: Vector F n
leading_entry:= leading_entry_compute F
  (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   match fldchoice0 (v i) with
   | inl _ => 1%ring
   | inr _ => 0%ring
   end): Maybe.maybe (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
some: ∑ x : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, leading_entry = Maybe.just x
some_neq_0: match fldchoice0 (v (pr1 some)) with
| inl _ => 1%ring
| inr _ => 0%ring
end != 0%ring
prev_eq_0: ∏ i_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
i_2 < pr1 some
→ match fldchoice0 (v i_2) with
  | inl _ => 1%ring
  | inr _ => 0%ring
  end = 0%ring
v (let X := pr1 some in X) = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   natgtb (pr1 (let X := pr1 some in X)) j = true
   → v j != 0%ring)

  (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   match fldchoice0 (v i) with
   | inl _ => 1%ring
   | inr _ => 0%ring
   end): Maybe.maybe (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
some: ∑ x : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, leading_entry = Maybe.just x
p: v (pr1 some) = 0%ring
some_neq_0: 1%ring != 0%ring
prev_eq_0: ∏ i_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
i_2 < pr1 some
→ match fldchoice0 (v i_2) with
  | inl _ => 1%ring
  | inr _ => 0%ring
  end = 0%ring

   natgtb (pr1 (let X := pr1 some in X)) j = true
   → v j != 0%ring)

   match fldchoice0 (v i) with

p: v (pr1 some) = 0%ring
some_neq_0: 1%ring != 0%ring
prev_eq_0: ∏ i_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
i_2 < pr1 some
→ match fldchoice0 (v i_2) with
  | inl _ => 1%ring
  | inr _ => 0%ring
  end = 0%ring
(λ _ : v (let X := pr1 some in X) = 0%ring,
 ∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
 natgtb (pr1 (let X := pr1 some in X)) j = true
 → v j != 0%ring) p

→ match fldchoice0 (v i_2) with

  end = 0%ring
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
lt: natgtb (pr1 (let X := pr1 some in X)) j = true

F: fld

v: Vector F n
leading_entry:= leading_entry_compute F
  (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   match fldchoice0 (v i) with

v j != 0%ring

    now destruct (fldchoice0 (v j)).
  
F: fld
n: ℕ
v: Vector F n
leading_entry:= leading_entry_compute F
  (flip_fld_bin_vec v): Maybe.maybe (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
none: leading_entry = Maybe.nothing
(∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, v j != 0%ring)
⨿ (∑ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   v i = 0%ring
   × (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, j < pr1 i → v j != 0%ring))

v j != flip_fld_bin_vec v j

leading_entry:= leading_entry_compute F
  (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   match fldchoice0 (v i) with

contr_neq: 0%ring = 1%ring
∅

      contradiction (nonzeroax _ (pathsinv0 contr_neq)).
    
F: fld
n: ℕ
v: Vector F n
leading_entry:= leading_entry_compute F
  (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   match fldchoice0 (v i) with
   | inl _ => 1%ring
   | inr _ => 0%ring
   end): Maybe.maybe (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
none: leading_entry = Maybe.nothing
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
neq: v j != 0%ring
p: v j = 0%ring
v j != 1%ring
 
F: fld
n: ℕ
v: Vector F n
leading_entry:= leading_entry_compute F
  (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   match fldchoice0 (v i) with
   | inl _ => 1%ring
   | inr _ => 0%ring
   end): Maybe.maybe (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
none: leading_entry = Maybe.nothing
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
neq: v j != 0%ring
p, contr_eq: v j = 0%ring
v j != 1%ring
F: fld
n: ℕ
v: Vector F n
leading_entry:= leading_entry_compute F
  (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   match fldchoice0 (v i) with
   | inl _ => 1%ring
   | inr _ => 0%ring
   end): Maybe.maybe (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
none: leading_entry = Maybe.nothing
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
neq: v j != 0%ring
p: v j = 0%ring
n0: v j != 0%ring
v j != 1%ring

n: ℕ
v: Vector F n
leading_entry:= leading_entry_compute F
  (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   match fldchoice0 (v i) with
   | inl _ => 1%ring
   | inr _ => 0%ring
   end): Maybe.maybe (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
none: leading_entry = Maybe.nothing
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
neq: v j != 0%ring
p, contr_eq: v j = 0%ring
v j != 1%ring

F: fld
n: ℕ
v: Vector F n
(∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, v j != 0%ring)
⨿ (∑ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, v i = 0%ring)

⨿ (∑ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, v i = 0%ring)

    
F: fld
n: ℕ
v: Vector F n
l: ∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, v j != 0%ring
(∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, v j != 0%ring)

F: fld
n: ℕ
v: Vector F n
r: ∑ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
v i = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, j < pr1 i → v j != 0%ring)
(∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, v j != 0%ring)
⨿ (∑ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, v i = 0%ring)
 
F: fld
n: ℕ

l: ∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, v j != 0%ring
(∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, v j != 0%ring)
⨿ (∑ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, v i = 0%ring)
now left. 
F: fld
n: ℕ
v: Vector F n
r: ∑ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
v i = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, j < pr1 i → v j != 0%ring)
(∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, v j != 0%ring)
⨿ (∑ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, v i = 0%ring)

    right; exists (pr1 r); exact (pr1 (pr2 r)).
  Defined.

  (** Showing that right invertible matrix, upper triangular,
     must have all non-zero diagonal. *)

  (** Ax = 0 would have two solutions for x, but A invertible... *)
  
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: ∑ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
mat i i = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, j < i → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
∅

mat i i = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, j < i → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
∅

 now apply (@matrix_left_inverse_to_transpose_right_inverse F).

F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: ∑ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,

× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, j < i → mat j j != 0%ring)

  col_vec (const_vec 0%rig)

mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: ∑ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
mat i i = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, j < i → mat j j != 0%ring)

× matrix_mult mat (col_vec x) =
  col_vec (const_vec 0%rig)
(λ (i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (j : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn),
 iterop_fun 0%rig op1
   (λ k : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (mat i k * col_vec (const_vec 0%rig) k j)%ring)) =
col_vec (const_vec 0%rig)

          
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: ∑ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
mat i i = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, j < i → mat j j != 0%ring)

× matrix_mult mat (col_vec x) =
  col_vec (const_vec 0%rig)

 iterop_fun 0%rig op1
   (λ k0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (mat k k0 * col_vec (const_vec 0%rig) k0 j)%ring)) =
col_vec (const_vec 0%rig) k

(λ _ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn, 0%rig)

  col_vec (const_vec 0%rig)
k: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
(λ k0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, (mat k k0 * 0%rig)%ring) ~
const_vec 0%rig
 intros ?; apply rigmultx0. 
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: ∑ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
mat i i = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, j < i → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 zero
contr_exists: ∑ (x : Vector F n) (i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
x i' != 0%rig
× matrix_mult mat (col_vec x) =
  col_vec (const_vec 0%rig)
k: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
(λ _ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn, 0%rig) =
(λ _ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn, 0%rig)

          reflexivity.
        
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: ∑ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
mat i i = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, j < i → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 zero
contr_exists: ∑ (x : Vector F n) (i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
x i' != 0%rig
× matrix_mult mat (col_vec x) =
  col_vec (const_vec 0%rig)
eqz: matrix_mult mat (col_vec (const_vec 0%rig)) =
col_vec (const_vec 0%rig)
∅

F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: ∑ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
mat i i = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, j < i → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: Matrix F n n
isinv: matrix_mult inv mat = identity_matrix
gt: 0 < pr1 zero
x1: Vector F n
x2: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
x3: x1 x2 != 0%rig
contr_exists: matrix_mult mat
  (λ (i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
   (_ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn), x1 i) =
matrix_mult mat
  (λ (_ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
   (_ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn), 0%rig)
eqz: matrix_mult mat
  (λ (i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (_ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn), x1 i) =
(λ (_ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (_ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn), 0%rig)
eq: (λ (i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (_ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn), x1 i) =
matrix_mult inv
  (λ (_ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (_ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn), 0%rig)
eq':= matrix_mult_zero_vec_eq: matrix_mult inv
  (λ (_ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (_ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn), 0%rig) =
(λ (_ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (_ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn), 0%rig)
0%ring != 0%ring

  (λ (_ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (_ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn), 0%rig) =

contr_eq': (λ (_ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (_ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn),
 0%rig) idx0 =
(λ (_ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (_ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn),
 x1 x2) idx0
0%ring != 0%ring
 
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: Matrix F n n
isinv: matrix_mult inv mat = identity_matrix
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
x1: Vector F n
x2: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
x3: x1 x2 != 0%rig
contr_exists: matrix_mult mat
  (λ (i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
   (_ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn), x1 i) =
matrix_mult mat
  (λ (_ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
   (_ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn), 0%rig)
eqz: matrix_mult mat
  (λ (i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (_ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn), x1 i) =
(λ (_ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (_ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn), 0%rig)
eq: (λ (i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (_ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn), x1 i) ~
(λ (_ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (_ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn), 0%rig)
eq':= matrix_mult_zero_vec_eq: matrix_mult inv
  (λ (_ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (_ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn), 0%rig) =
(λ (_ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (_ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn), 0%rig)
idx0:= make_stn n 0 (stn_implies_ngt0 zero): (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
(λ _ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn, 0%rig) =
(λ _ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn, x1 x2)
 now rewrite eq.

n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: Matrix F n n

gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
x1: Vector F n
x2: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
x3: x1 x2 != 0%rig
contr_exists: matrix_mult mat
  (λ (i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
   (_ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn), x1 i) =

F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: Matrix F n n
isinv: matrix_mult inv mat = identity_matrix
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
x1: Vector F n
x2: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
x3: x1 x2 != x1 x2
contr_exists: matrix_mult mat
  (λ (i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
   (_ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn), x1 i) =
matrix_mult mat
  (λ (_ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
   (_ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn), 0%rig)
eqz: matrix_mult mat
  (λ (i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (_ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn), x1 i) =
(λ (_ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (_ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn), 0%rig)
eq: (λ (i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (_ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn), x1 i) ~
(λ (_ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (_ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn), 0%rig)
eq':= matrix_mult_zero_vec_eq: matrix_mult inv
  (λ (_ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (_ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn), 0%rig) =
(λ (_ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (_ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn), 0%rig)
idx0:= make_stn n 0 (stn_implies_ngt0 zero): (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
contr_eq': (λ _ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn, 0%rig) ~
(λ _ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn, x1 x2)
0%ring != 0%ring

        contradiction.
    
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: ∑ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
mat i i = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, j < i → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 zero
∑ (x : Vector F n) (i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
x i' != 0%rig
× matrix_mult mat (col_vec x) =
  col_vec (const_vec 0%rig)

    
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
∑ (x : Vector F n) (i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
x i' != 0%rig
× matrix_mult mat (col_vec x) =
  col_vec (const_vec 0%rig)

mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat

F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
(λ x : Vector F n,
 ∑ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
 x i' != 0%rig
 × matrix_mult mat (col_vec x) =
   col_vec (const_vec 0%rig)) 
  ?pr1

n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring

F
 exact (@rigunel2 F).

F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
(λ x : Vector F n,
 ∑ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
 x i' != 0%rig
 × matrix_mult mat (col_vec x) =
   col_vec (const_vec 0%rig))
  (back_sub_internal F mat
     ((λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
       let c := natlthorgeh (pr1 zero) j in
       match c with
       | inl h => (λ _ : pr1 zero < j, 0%rig) h
       | inr h =>
           (λ h0 : pr1 zero ≥ j,
            let c0 := natgehchoice (pr1 zero) j h0 in
            match c0 with
            | inl h1 => (λ _ : pr1 zero > j, 0%rig) h1
            | inr p => (λ _ : pr1 zero = j, 1%rig) p
            end) h
       end)
      :
      Vector F n) (const_vec 0%rig) (n,, natgthsnn n)
     (pr1 zero,,
      istransnatlth (pr1 zero) n (S n) (pr2 zero)
        (natgthsnn n)))

    
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
back_sub_internal F mat
  (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   let c := natlthorgeh (pr1 zero) j in
   match c with
   | inl _ => 0%rig
   | inr h =>
       let c0 := natgehchoice (pr1 zero) j h in
       match c0 with
       | inl _ => 0%rig
       | inr _ => 1%rig
       end
   end) (const_vec 0%rig) (n,, natgthsnn n)
  (pr1 zero,,
   istransnatlth (pr1 zero) n (S n) (pr2 zero)
     (natgthsnn n)) zero != 0%rig
× matrix_mult mat
    (col_vec
       (back_sub_internal F mat
          (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
           let c := natlthorgeh (pr1 zero) j in
           match c with
           | inl _ => 0%rig
           | inr h =>
               let c0 := natgehchoice (pr1 zero) j h
                 in
               match c0 with
               | inl _ => 0%rig
               | inr _ => 1%rig
               end
           end) (const_vec 0%rig) (n,, natgthsnn n)
          (pr1 zero,,
           istransnatlth (pr1 zero) n (S n) (pr2 zero)
             (natgthsnn n)))) =
  col_vec (const_vec 0%rig)

    
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
back_sub_internal F mat
  (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   let c := natlthorgeh (pr1 zero) j in
   match c with
   | inl _ => 0%rig
   | inr h =>
       let c0 := natgehchoice (pr1 zero) j h in
       match c0 with
       | inl _ => 0%rig
       | inr _ => 1%rig
       end
   end) (const_vec 0%rig) (n,, natgthsnn n)
  (pr1 zero,,
   istransnatlth (pr1 zero) n (S n) (pr2 zero)
     (natgthsnn n)) zero != 0%rig
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
(λ _ : back_sub_internal F mat
         (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
          let c := natlthorgeh (pr1 zero) j in
          match c with
          | inl _ => 0%rig
          | inr h =>
              let c0 := natgehchoice (pr1 zero) j h in
              match c0 with
              | inl _ => 0%rig
              | inr _ => 1%rig
              end
          end) (const_vec 0%rig) 
         (n,, natgthsnn n)
         (pr1 zero,,
          istransnatlth (pr1 zero) n 
            (S n) (pr2 zero) 
            (natgthsnn n)) zero != 0%rig,
 matrix_mult mat
   (col_vec
      (back_sub_internal F mat
         (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
          let c := natlthorgeh (pr1 zero) j in
          match c with
          | inl _ => 0%rig
          | inr h =>
              let c0 := natgehchoice (pr1 zero) j h in
              match c0 with
              | inl _ => 0%rig
              | inr _ => 1%rig
              end
          end) (const_vec 0%rig) 
         (n,, natgthsnn n)
         (pr1 zero,,
          istransnatlth (pr1 zero) n 
            (S n) (pr2 zero) 
            (natgthsnn n)))) =
 col_vec (const_vec 0%rig)) 
  ?pr1

    
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
back_sub_internal F mat
  (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   let c := natlthorgeh (pr1 zero) j in
   match c with
   | inl _ => 0%rig
   | inr h =>
       let c0 := natgehchoice (pr1 zero) j h in
       match c0 with
       | inl _ => 0%rig
       | inr _ => 1%rig
       end
   end) (const_vec 0%rig) (n,, natgthsnn n)
  (pr1 zero,,
   istransnatlth (pr1 zero) n (S n) (pr2 zero)
     (natgthsnn n)) zero != 0%rig
 
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
(let c := natlthorgeh (pr1 zero) zero in
 match c with
 | inl _ => 0%rig
 | inr h =>
     let c0 := natgehchoice (pr1 zero) zero h in
     match c0 with
     | inl _ => 0%rig
     | inr _ => 1%rig
     end
 end) != 0%rig

n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn

× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)

gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
zero
≥ pr1 zero,,
  istransnatlth (pr1 zero) n 
    (S n) (pr2 zero) (natgthsnn n)

      
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn

× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
zero
≥ pr1 zero,,
  istransnatlth (pr1 zero) n (S n) (pr2 zero)
    (natgthsnn n)
apply isreflnatleh. 
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
(let c := natlthorgeh (pr1 zero) zero in
 match c with
 | inl _ => 0%rig
 | inr h =>
     let c0 := natgehchoice (pr1 zero) zero h in
     match c0 with
     | inl _ => 0%rig
     | inr _ => 1%rig

 end) != 0%rig

      
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
lt: pr1 zero < zero
(let c := inl lt in
 match c with
 | inl _ => 0%rig
 | inr h =>
     let c0 := natgehchoice (pr1 zero) zero h in
     match c0 with
     | inl _ => 0%rig
     | inr _ => 1%rig
     end
 end) != 0%rig
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
ge: pr1 zero ≥ zero
(let c := inr ge in
 match c with
 | inl _ => 0%rig
 | inr h =>
     let c0 := natgehchoice (pr1 zero) zero h in
     match c0 with
     | inl _ => 0%rig
     | inr _ => 1%rig
     end
 end) != 0%rig

      
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
lt: pr1 zero < zero
(let c := inl lt in
 match c with
 | inl _ => 0%rig
 | inr h =>
     let c0 := natgehchoice (pr1 zero) zero h in
     match c0 with
     | inl _ => 0%rig
     | inr _ => 1%rig
     end
 end) != 0%rig
 contradiction (isirreflnatgth _ lt).

mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
ge: pr1 zero ≥ zero
(let c := inr ge in
 match c with
 | inl _ => 0%rig
 | inr h =>
     let c0 := natgehchoice (pr1 zero) zero h in

F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
ge: pr1 zero ≥ zero
match natgehchoice (pr1 zero) zero ge with
| inl _ => 0%rig
| inr _ => 1%rig
end != 0%rig
 
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
ge: pr1 zero ≥ zero
gt: pr1 zero > zero
0%rig != 0%rig
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
ge: pr1 zero ≥ zero
eq: pr1 zero = zero
1%rig != 0%rig

        
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
ge: pr1 zero ≥ zero
gt: pr1 zero > zero
0%rig != 0%rig
contradiction (isirreflnatlth _ gt). 
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
ge: pr1 zero ≥ zero
eq: pr1 zero = zero
1%rig != 0%rig

        apply (@nonzeroax F).
    
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
(λ _ : back_sub_internal F mat
         (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
          let c := natlthorgeh (pr1 zero) j in
          match c with
          | inl _ => 0%rig
          | inr h =>
              let c0 := natgehchoice (pr1 zero) j h in
              match c0 with
              | inl _ => 0%rig
              | inr _ => 1%rig
              end
          end) (const_vec 0%rig) (n,, natgthsnn n)
         (pr1 zero,,
          istransnatlth (pr1 zero) n (S n) (pr2 zero)
            (natgthsnn n)) zero != 0%rig,
 matrix_mult mat
   (col_vec
      (back_sub_internal F mat
         (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
          let c := natlthorgeh (pr1 zero) j in
          match c with
          | inl _ => 0%rig
          | inr h =>
              let c0 := natgehchoice (pr1 zero) j h in
              match c0 with
              | inl _ => 0%rig
              | inr _ => 1%rig
              end
          end) (const_vec 0%rig) (n,, natgthsnn n)
         (pr1 zero,,
          istransnatlth (pr1 zero) n (S n) (pr2 zero)
            (natgthsnn n)))) =
 col_vec (const_vec 0%rig))
  (internal_paths_rew_r F
     (back_sub_internal F mat
        (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
         let c := natlthorgeh (pr1 zero) j in
         match c with
         | inl _ => 0%rig
         | inr h =>
             let c0 := natgehchoice (pr1 zero) j h in
             match c0 with
             | inl _ => 0%rig
             | inr _ => 1%rig
             end
         end) (const_vec 0%rig) (n,, natgthsnn n)
        (pr1 zero,,
         istransnatlth (pr1 zero) n (S n) (pr2 zero)
           (natgthsnn n)) zero)
     (let c := natlthorgeh (pr1 zero) zero in
      match c with
      | inl _ => 0%rig
      | inr h =>
          let c0 := natgehchoice (pr1 zero) zero h in
          match c0 with
          | inl _ => 0%rig
          | inr _ => 1%rig
          end
      end) (λ p : F, p != 0%rig)
     (let c := natlthorgeh (pr1 zero) zero in
      match
        c as c0
        return
          ((let c1 := c0 in
            match c1 with
            | inl _ => 0%rig
            | inr h =>
                let c2 :=
                  natgehchoice (pr1 zero) zero h in
                match c2 with
                | inl _ => 0%rig
                | inr _ => 1%rig
                end
            end) != 0%rig)
      with
      | inl h =>
          (λ lt : pr1 zero < zero,
           empty_rect
             (λ _ : ∅,
              (let c0 := inl lt in
               match c0 with
               | inl _ => 0%rig
               | inr h0 =>
                   let c1 :=
                     natgehchoice (pr1 zero) zero h0
                     in
                   match c1 with
                   | inl _ => 0%rig
                   | inr _ => 1%rig
                   end
               end) != 0%rig) (negnatlthnn zero lt)) h
      | inr h =>
          (λ ge : pr1 zero ≥ zero,
           (let c0 := natgehchoice (pr1 zero) zero ge
              in
            match
              c0 as c1
              return
                (match c1 with
                 | inl _ => 0%rig
                 | inr _ => 1%rig
                 end != 0%rig)
            with
            | inl h0 =>
                (λ gt : pr1 zero > zero,
                 empty_rect (λ _ : ∅, 0%rig != 0%rig)
                   (negnatgthnn (pr1 zero) gt)) h0
            | inr p =>
                (λ _ : pr1 zero = zero, nonzeroax F) p
            end)
           :
           (let c0 := inr ge in
            match c0 with
            | inl _ => 0%rig
            | inr h0 =>
                let c1 :=
                  natgehchoice (pr1 zero) zero h0 in
                match c1 with
                | inl _ => 0%rig
                | inr _ => 1%rig
                end
            end) != 0%rig) h
      end)
     (back_sub_internal_inv1 F mat
        (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
         let c := natlthorgeh (pr1 zero) j in
         match c with
         | inl _ => 0%rig
         | inr h =>
             let c0 := natgehchoice (pr1 zero) j h in
             match c0 with
             | inl _ => 0%rig
             | inr _ => 1%rig
             end
         end) (const_vec 0%rig) ut (n,, natgthsnn n)
        (pr1 zero,,
         istransnatlth (pr1 zero) n (S n) (pr2 zero)
           (natgthsnn n)) zero (isreflnatleh zero)))
 
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
matrix_mult mat
  (col_vec
     (back_sub_internal F mat
        (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
         let c := natlthorgeh (pr1 zero) j in
         match c with
         | inl _ => 0%rig
         | inr h =>
             let c0 := natgehchoice (pr1 zero) j h in
             match c0 with
             | inl _ => 0%rig
             | inr _ => 1%rig
             end
         end) (const_vec 0%rig) (n,, natgthsnn n)
        (pr1 zero,,
         istransnatlth (pr1 zero) n (S n) (pr2 zero)
           (natgthsnn n)))) j =
col_vec (const_vec 0%rig) j

      
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
h: j < zero
matrix_mult mat
  (col_vec
     (back_sub_internal F mat
        (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
         let c := natlthorgeh (pr1 zero) j in
         match c with
         | inl _ => 0%rig
         | inr h =>
             let c0 := natgehchoice (pr1 zero) j h in
             match c0 with
             | inl _ => 0%rig
             | inr _ => 1%rig
             end
         end) (const_vec 0%rig) (n,, natgthsnn n)
        (pr1 zero,,
         istransnatlth (pr1 zero) n (S n) (pr2 zero)
           (natgthsnn n)))) j =
col_vec (const_vec 0%rig) j
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
ge: j ≥ zero
matrix_mult mat
  (col_vec
     (back_sub_internal F mat
        (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
         let c := natlthorgeh (pr1 zero) j in
         match c with
         | inl _ => 0%rig
         | inr h =>
             let c0 := natgehchoice (pr1 zero) j h in
             match c0 with
             | inl _ => 0%rig
             | inr _ => 1%rig
             end
         end) (const_vec 0%rig) 
        (n,, natgthsnn n)
        (pr1 zero,,
         istransnatlth (pr1 zero) n 
           (S n) (pr2 zero) 
           (natgthsnn n)))) j =
col_vec (const_vec 0%rig) j

      
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
h: j < zero
matrix_mult mat
  (col_vec
     (back_sub_internal F mat
        (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
         let c := natlthorgeh (pr1 zero) j in
         match c with
         | inl _ => 0%rig
         | inr h =>
             let c0 := natgehchoice (pr1 zero) j h in
             match c0 with
             | inl _ => 0%rig
             | inr _ => 1%rig
             end
         end) (const_vec 0%rig) (n,, natgthsnn n)
        (pr1 zero,,
         istransnatlth (pr1 zero) n (S n) (pr2 zero)
           (natgthsnn n)))) j =
col_vec (const_vec 0%rig) j
 
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
h: j < zero
j ≥ dualelement (n,, natgthsnn n)
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
h: j < zero
mat j j != 0%ring

        
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
h: j < zero
j ≥ dualelement (n,, natgthsnn n)
 apply dualelement_sn_stn_ge_n.
        
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
h: j < zero
mat j j != 0%ring
 now apply (pr2 iszero).
      
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
ge: j ≥ zero
matrix_mult mat
  (col_vec
     (back_sub_internal F mat
        (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
         let c := natlthorgeh (pr1 zero) j in
         match c with
         | inl _ => 0%rig
         | inr h =>
             let c0 := natgehchoice (pr1 zero) j h in
             match c0 with
             | inl _ => 0%rig
             | inr _ => 1%rig
             end
         end) (const_vec 0%rig) (n,, natgthsnn n)
        (pr1 zero,,
         istransnatlth (pr1 zero) n (S n) (pr2 zero)
           (natgthsnn n)))) j =
col_vec (const_vec 0%rig) j
 
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
ge: j ≥ zero
(λ j0 : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn,
 iterop_fun 0%rig op1
   (λ k : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (mat j k *
     col_vec
       (back_sub_internal F mat
          (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
           match natlthorgeh (pr1 zero) j with
           | inl _ => 0%rig
           | inr h =>
               match natgehchoice (pr1 zero) j h with
               | inl _ => 0%rig
               | inr _ => 1%rig
               end
           end) (const_vec 0%rig) (n,, natgthsnn n)
          (pr1 zero,,
           istransnatlth (pr1 zero) n (S n) (pr2 zero)
             (natgthsnn n))) k j0)%ring)) =
col_vec (const_vec 0%rig) j

        
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
ge: j ≥ zero
(λ _ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn,
 iterop_fun 0%rig op1
   (λ k : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (mat j k *
     back_sub_internal F mat
       (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
        match natlthorgeh (pr1 zero) j with
        | inl _ => 0%rig
        | inr h =>
            match natgehchoice (pr1 zero) j h with
            | inl _ => 0%rig
            | inr _ => 1%rig
            end
        end) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, 0%rig)
       (n,, natgthsnn n)
       (pr1 zero,,
        istransnatlth (pr1 zero) n (S n) (pr2 zero)
          (natgthsnn n)) k)%ring)) =
(λ _ : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn, 0%rig)

        
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
ge: j ≥ zero
x: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
iterop_fun 0%rig op1
  (λ k : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   (mat j k *
    back_sub_internal F mat
      (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
       match natlthorgeh (pr1 zero) j with
       | inl _ => 0%rig
       | inr h =>
           match natgehchoice (pr1 zero) j h with
           | inl _ => 0%rig
           | inr _ => 1%rig
           end
       end) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, 0%rig)
      (n,, natgthsnn n)
      (pr1 zero,,
       istransnatlth (pr1 zero) n (S n) (pr2 zero)
         (natgthsnn n)) k)%ring) = 0%rig

        
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
ge: j ≥ zero
x: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
(λ k : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
 (mat j k *
  back_sub_internal F mat
    (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
     match natlthorgeh (pr1 zero) j with
     | inl _ => 0%rig
     | inr h =>
         match natgehchoice (pr1 zero) j h with
         | inl _ => 0%rig
         | inr _ => 1%rig
         end
     end) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, 0%rig) (n,, natgthsnn n)
    (pr1 zero,,
     istransnatlth (pr1 zero) n (S n) (pr2 zero)
       (natgthsnn n)) k)%ring) ~ const_vec 0%rig

ut: is_upper_triangular mat

j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
ge: j ≥ zero

h: j > k
(mat j k *
 back_sub_internal F mat
   (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,

      (natgthsnn n)) k)%ring = const_vec 0%rig k

const_vec 0%rig k

F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
ge: j ≥ zero
x: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
k: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
le: j ≤ k
eq: zero = k
(mat j k *
 back_sub_internal F mat
   (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    match natlthorgeh (pr1 zero) j with
    | inl _ => 0%rig

F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
ge: j ≥ zero
x: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
k: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
le: j ≤ k
h: NegativePropositions.negProp_to_hProp
  (zero ≠ k)%stn
(mat j k *
 back_sub_internal F mat
   (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    match natlthorgeh (pr1 zero) j with
    | inl _ => 0%rig
    | inr h =>
        match natgehchoice (pr1 zero) j h with
        | inl _ => 0%rig
        | inr _ => 1%rig
        end
    end) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, 0%rig) 
   (n,, natgthsnn n)
   (pr1 zero,,
    istransnatlth (pr1 zero) n 
      (S n) (pr2 zero) (natgthsnn n)) k)%ring =
const_vec 0%rig k

le: j ≤ k
eq: zero = k
(mat j k *

mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat

j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
ge: j ≥ zero
x: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn

le: j ≤ zero
eq: zero = k
(mat zero zero *

      (natgthsnn n)) zero)%ring = const_vec 0%rig zero

          rewrite (pr1 iszero); apply rigmult0x.
        
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
ge: j ≥ zero
x: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
k: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
le: j ≤ k
h: NegativePropositions.negProp_to_hProp
  (zero ≠ k)%stn
(mat j k *
 back_sub_internal F mat
   (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    match natlthorgeh (pr1 zero) j with
    | inl _ => 0%rig
    | inr h =>
        match natgehchoice (pr1 zero) j h with
        | inl _ => 0%rig
        | inr _ => 1%rig

   (pr1 zero,,
    istransnatlth (pr1 zero) n (S n) (pr2 zero)
      (natgthsnn n)) k)%ring = const_vec 0%rig k

ge: j ≥ zero

(mat j k *
 back_sub_internal F mat

      (natgthsnn n)) k)%ring = ?b
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
ge: j ≥ zero
x: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
k: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
le: j ≤ k
h: NegativePropositions.negProp_to_hProp
  (zero ≠ k)%stn
?b = const_vec 0%rig k
 
F: fld

mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
ge: j ≥ zero
x: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
k: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
le: j ≤ k
h: NegativePropositions.negProp_to_hProp
  (zero ≠ k)%stn
?b = const_vec 0%rig k
apply rigmultx0. 
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)

gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
ge: j ≥ zero
x: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
k: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
le: j ≤ k
h: NegativePropositions.negProp_to_hProp
  (zero ≠ k)%stn
(mat j k *
 back_sub_internal F mat
   (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    match natlthorgeh (pr1 zero) j with
    | inl _ => 0%rig
    | inr h =>
        match natgehchoice (pr1 zero) j h with
        | inl _ => 0%rig
        | inr _ => 1%rig

   (pr1 zero,,
    istransnatlth (pr1 zero) n (S n) (pr2 zero)
      (natgthsnn n)) k)%ring = (?x * 0%rig)%ring

          
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
ge: j ≥ zero
x: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
k: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
le: j ≤ k
h: NegativePropositions.negProp_to_hProp
  (zero ≠ k)%stn
back_sub_internal F mat
  (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   match natlthorgeh (pr1 zero) j with
   | inl _ => 0%rig
   | inr h =>
       match natgehchoice (pr1 zero) j h with
       | inl _ => 0%rig
       | inr _ => 1%rig
       end
   end) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, 0%rig) (n,, natgthsnn n)
  (pr1 zero,,
   istransnatlth (pr1 zero) n (S n) (pr2 zero)
     (natgthsnn n)) k = 0%rig

          
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
ge: j ≥ zero
x: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
k: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
le: j ≤ k
h: NegativePropositions.negProp_to_hProp
  (zero ≠ k)%stn
match natlthorgeh (pr1 zero) k with
| inl _ => 0%rig
| inr h =>
    match natgehchoice (pr1 zero) k h with
    | inl _ => 0%rig
    | inr _ => 1%rig
    end
end = 0%rig
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
ge: j ≥ zero
x: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
k: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
le: j ≤ k
h: NegativePropositions.negProp_to_hProp
  (zero ≠ k)%stn
k
≥ pr1 zero,,
  istransnatlth (pr1 zero) n 
    (S n) (pr2 zero) (natgthsnn n)

          
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
ge: j ≥ zero
x: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
k: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
le: j ≤ k
h: NegativePropositions.negProp_to_hProp
  (zero ≠ k)%stn
k
≥ pr1 zero,,
  istransnatlth (pr1 zero) n (S n) (pr2 zero)
    (natgthsnn n)
apply (istransnatleh ge le). 
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
ge: j ≥ zero
x: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
k: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
le: j ≤ k
h: NegativePropositions.negProp_to_hProp
  (zero ≠ k)%stn
match natlthorgeh (pr1 zero) k with
| inl _ => 0%rig
| inr h =>
    match natgehchoice (pr1 zero) k h with
    | inl _ => 0%rig
    | inr _ => 1%rig
    end
end = 0%rig

          
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
ge: j ≥ zero
x: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
k: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
le: j ≤ k
h: NegativePropositions.negProp_to_hProp
  (zero ≠ k)%stn
h0: pr1 zero ≥ k
match natgehchoice (pr1 zero) k h0 with
| inl _ => 0%rig
| inr _ => 1%rig
end = 0%rig

          
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
ge: j ≥ zero
x: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
k: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
le: j ≤ k
h: NegativePropositions.negProp_to_hProp
  (zero ≠ k)%stn
h0: pr1 zero ≥ k
eq: pr1 zero = k
1%rig = 0%rig

          
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
zero: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iszero: mat zero zero = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < zero → mat j j != 0%ring)
inv: matrix_left_inverse mat
gt: 0 < pr1 (zero,, iszero)
j, k: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
ge: j ≥ k
x: (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn
le: j ≤ k
h: NegativePropositions.negProp_to_hProp (k ≠ k)%stn
h0: pr1 k ≥ k
eq: pr1 zero = k
1%rig = 0%rig

          contradiction (isirrefl_natneq k).
  Defined.

End BackSubZero.

(** Some results that are useful in the next section. *)
Section Misc.

  Context (F: fld).

  (** Row echelon form implies upper triangularity*)
  
F: fld
m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
p: n > 0
iter: (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn
is_row_echelon_partial F mat iter
→ is_upper_triangular_partial mat

  
F: fld
m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
p: n > 0
iter: (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn
is_row_echelon_partial F mat iter
→ is_upper_triangular_partial mat

    
F: fld
m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
p: n > 0
iter: (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn
is_row_echelon_partial_1 F mat iter
× is_row_echelon_partial_2 F mat iter
→ ∏ (i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
  i > j → i < iter → mat i j = 0%rig

    
F: fld
m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
p: n > 0
iter: ℕ
p': iter < S m
is_row_echelon_partial_1 F mat (iter,, p')
× is_row_echelon_partial_2 F mat (iter,, p')
→ ∏ (i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
  i > j → i < iter,, p' → mat i j = 0%rig

    
F: fld
m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
p: n > 0
iter: ℕ
p': iter < S m
(∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
 i_1 < iter,, p'
 → is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
   → i_1 < i_2 → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring)
× (∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   i_1 < iter,, p'
   → mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
     → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring)
→ ∏ (i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
  i > j → i < iter,, p' → mat i j = 0%rig

    
F: fld
m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
p: n > 0
p': 0 < S m
(∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
 i_1 < 0,, p'
 → is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
   → i_1 < i_2 → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring)
× (∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   i_1 < 0,, p'
   → mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
     → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring)
→ ∏ (i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
  i > j → i < 0,, p' → mat i j = 0%rig

iter: ℕ

IH: ∏ p' : iter < S m,
(∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)

 → is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
   → i_1 < i_2 → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring)
× (∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   i_1 < iter,, p'
   → mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
     → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring)
→ ∏ (i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
  i > j → i < iter,, p' → mat i j = 0%rig
(∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
 i_1 < S iter,, p'
 → is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
   → i_1 < i_2 → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring)
× (∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   i_1 < S iter,, p'
   → mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
     → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring)
→ ∏ (i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
  i > j → i < S iter,, p' → mat i j = 0%rig

    
F: fld
m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
p: n > 0
p': 0 < S m
(∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
 i_1 < 0,, p'
 → is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2

× (∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   i_1 < 0,, p'
   → mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
     → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring)
→ ∏ (i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
  i > j → i < 0,, p' → mat i j = 0%rig
 intros ? ? ? ? contr; contradiction (negnatlthn0 n contr).

F: fld
m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
p: n > 0
iter: ℕ
p': S iter < S m
IH: ∏ p' : iter < S m,
(∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
 (j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
 i_1 < iter,, p'
 → is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
   → i_1 < i_2 → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring)
× (∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   i_1 < iter,, p'
   → mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
     → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring)
→ ∏ (i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
  i > j → i < iter,, p' → mat i j = 0%rig
re_1: ∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
(j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
  → i_1 < i_2
    → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring
re_2: ∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
  → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
lt: i > j
lt': i < S iter,, p'
mat i j = 0%rig

 (j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),

(j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),

  → i_1 < i_2

→ mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
  → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring

j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
lt: i > j
lt': i < S iter,, p'
iter_lt_sn:= istransnatlth iter m (S m) p'
  (natgthsnn m): iter < S m
mat i j = 0%rig

  (natgthsnn m): iter < S m
eq: i = iter
mat i j = 0%rig

    → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring
re_2: ∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
  → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
lt: i > j
lt': i < S iter,, p'
iter_lt_sn:= istransnatlth iter m (S m) p'
  (natgthsnn m): iter < S m
i ≤ iter
now apply natlthsntoleh. 
F: fld
m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
p: n > 0
iter: ℕ
p': natgtb m iter = true
IH: ∏ p' : iter < S m,
(∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
 (j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
 i_1 < iter,, p'
 → is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
   → i_1 < i_2 → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring)
× (∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   i_1 < iter,, p'
   → mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
     → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring)
→ ∏ (i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
  i > j → i < iter,, p' → mat i j = 0%rig
re_1: ∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
(j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
  → i_1 < i_2
    → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring

i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
  → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring

j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
lt: i > j
lt': i < S iter,, p'
iter_lt_sn:= istransnatlth iter m (S m) p'
  (natgthsnn m): iter < S m
h: i < iter
mat i j = 0%rig

F: fld
m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
p: n > 0
iter: ℕ
p': natgtb m iter = true
IH: ∏ p' : iter < S m,
(∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
 (j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
 i_1 < iter,, p'
 → is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
   → i_1 < i_2 → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring)
× (∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   i_1 < iter,, p'
   → mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
     → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring)
→ ∏ (i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
  i > j → i < iter,, p' → mat i j = 0%rig
re_1: ∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
(j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
  → i_1 < i_2
    → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring

→ mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring

j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn

 → is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2

× (∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,

     → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring)

        
F: fld
m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
p: n > 0
iter: ℕ
p': natgtb m iter = true
IH: ∏ p' : iter < S m,
(∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
 (j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
 i_1 < iter,, p'
 → is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
   → i_1 < i_2 → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring)
× (∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   i_1 < iter,, p'
   → mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
     → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring)
→ ∏ (i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
  i > j → i < iter,, p' → mat i j = 0%rig
re_1: ∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
(j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
  → i_1 < i_2
    → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring
re_2: ∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
  → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
lt: i > j
lt': i < S iter,, p'
iter_lt_sn:= istransnatlth iter m (S m) p'
  (natgthsnn m): iter < S m
h: i < iter
t: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
eq: leading_entry_compute F (mat i) = Maybe.just t
∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
natgtb iter i_1 = true
→ is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
  → natgtb i_2 i_1 = true
    → match stntonat n j_1 with
      | 0 => true
      | S m => natgtb j_2 m
      end = true → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring

p: n > 0

 (j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
 i_1 < iter,, p'
 → is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
   → i_1 < i_2 → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring)
× (∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   i_1 < iter,, p'
   → mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
     → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring)
→ ∏ (i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
  i > j → i < iter,, p' → mat i j = 0%rig
re_1: ∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
(j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
  → i_1 < i_2
    → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring
re_2: ∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
  → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
lt: i > j
lt': i < S iter,, p'
iter_lt_sn:= istransnatlth iter m (S m) p'
  (natgthsnn m): iter < S m
h: i < iter
t: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
eq: leading_entry_compute F (mat i) = Maybe.just t
∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
natgtb iter i_1 = true
→ mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
  → natgtb i_2 i_1 = true → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring

→ is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2

 (j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
 i_1 < iter,, p'
 → is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
   → i_1 < i_2 → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring)
× (∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   i_1 < iter,, p'
   → mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
     → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring)
→ ∏ (i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
  i > j → i < iter,, p' → mat i j = 0%rig
re_1: ∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
(j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
  → i_1 < i_2
    → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring

i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
  → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring

j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
lt: i > j
lt': i < S iter,, p'
iter_lt_sn:= istransnatlth iter m (S m) p'
  (natgthsnn m): iter < S m
h: i < iter

eq: leading_entry_compute F (mat i) = Maybe.just t
i_1, i_2: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j_1, j_2: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
i1_lt_iter: natgtb iter i_1 = true
H: is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
X: natgtb i_2 i_1 = true
X0: match stntonat n j_1 with
| 0 => true
| S m => natgtb j_2 m
end = true
mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring

          
F: fld
m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
p: n > 0
iter: ℕ
p': natgtb m iter = true
IH: ∏ p' : iter < S m,
(∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
 (j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
 i_1 < iter,, p'
 → is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
   → i_1 < i_2 → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring)
× (∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   i_1 < iter,, p'
   → mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
     → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring)
→ ∏ (i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
  i > j → i < iter,, p' → mat i j = 0%rig
re_1: ∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
(j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
  → i_1 < i_2
    → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring
re_2: ∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
  → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
lt: i > j
lt': i < S iter,, p'
iter_lt_sn:= istransnatlth iter m (S m) p'
  (natgthsnn m): iter < S m
h: i < iter
t: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
eq: leading_entry_compute F (mat i) = Maybe.just t
i_1, i_2: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j_1, j_2: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
i1_lt_iter: natgtb iter i_1 = true
H: is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
X: natgtb i_2 i_1 = true
X0: match stntonat n j_1 with
| 0 => true
| S m => natgtb j_2 m
end = true
i_1 < S iter,, p'

          apply (istransnatlth _ _ _ i1_lt_iter (natgthsnn iter)).

p: n > 0

p': natgtb m iter = true
IH: ∏ p' : iter < S m,

 → is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
   → i_1 < i_2 → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring)
× (∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   i_1 < iter,, p'
   → mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
     → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring)
→ ∏ (i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
  i > j → i < iter,, p' → mat i j = 0%rig

(j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
  → i_1 < i_2

i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring

j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn

  (natgthsnn m): iter < S m
h: i < iter

∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
natgtb iter i_1 = true
→ mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
  → natgtb i_2 i_1 = true → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring

 (j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
 i_1 < iter,, p'
 → is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
   → i_1 < i_2 → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring)
× (∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   i_1 < iter,, p'
   → mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
     → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring)
→ ∏ (i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
  i > j → i < iter,, p' → mat i j = 0%rig

(j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),

j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn

   → mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
     → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring)
→ ∏ (i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
  i > j → i < iter,, p' → mat i j = 0%rig
re_1: ∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
(j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
  → i_1 < i_2
    → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring
re_2: ∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
  → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
lt: i > j
lt': i < S iter,, p'
iter_lt_sn:= istransnatlth iter m (S m) p'
  (natgthsnn m): iter < S m
eq: i = iter
eq': i = iter,, p'
t: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
jst: leading_entry_compute F (mat i) = Maybe.just t
mat i j = 0%rig

(j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),

m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
p: n > 0

p': natgtb m iter = true

(∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
 (j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
 i_1 < iter,, p'
 → is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
   → i_1 < i_2 → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring)
× (∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   i_1 < iter,, p'
   → mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
     → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring)
→ ∏ (i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
  i > j → i < iter,, p' → mat i j = 0%rig
re_1: ∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
(j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
  → i_1 < i_2
    → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring
re_2: ∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
  → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
lt: i > j
lt': i < S iter,, p'
iter_lt_sn:= istransnatlth iter m (S m) p'
  (natgthsnn m): iter < S m
eq: i = iter
eq': i = iter,, p'
t: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
jst: leading_entry_compute F (mat i) = Maybe.just t
contr_gt: j ≥ t
H1:= leading_entry_compute_inv2 F (mat i) t jst: is_leading_entry (mat i) t
h: 0 < i
u: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
u_lt: S u = i
none_prev: leading_entry_compute F (mat u) =
Maybe.nothing
mat i j = 0%rig

m, n: ℕ

p: n > 0
iter: ℕ
p': natgtb m iter = true
IH: ∏ p' : iter < S m,
(∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
 (j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
 i_1 < iter,, p'
 → is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
   → i_1 < i_2 → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring)

     → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring)

  i > j → i < iter,, p' → mat i j = 0%rig

(j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),

→ is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2

→ mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring

→ is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2

→ mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring

 i_1 < iter,, p'
 → is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
   → i_1 < i_2 → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring)
× (∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   i_1 < iter,, p'
   → mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
     → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring)
→ ∏ (i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
  i > j → i < iter,, p' → mat i j = 0%rig
re_1: ∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
(j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
  → i_1 < i_2
    → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring

i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
  → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring

j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn

lt': i < S iter,, p'

eq': i = iter,, p'

m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
p: n > 0
iter: ℕ
p': natgtb m iter = true
IH: ∏ p' : iter < S m,
(∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
 (j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
 i_1 < iter,, p'
 → is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
   → i_1 < i_2 → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring)
× (∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   i_1 < iter,, p'
   → mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
     → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring)
→ ∏ (i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
  i > j → i < iter,, p' → mat i j = 0%rig
re_1: ∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
(j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
  → i_1 < i_2
    → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring
re_2: ∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
  → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
lt: i > j
lt': i < S iter,, p'
iter_lt_sn:= istransnatlth iter m (S m) p'
  (natgthsnn m): iter < S m
eq: i = iter
eq': i = iter,, p'
t: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
jst: leading_entry_compute F (mat i) = Maybe.just t
contr_gt: j ≥ t
H1:= leading_entry_compute_inv2 F (mat i) t jst: is_leading_entry (mat i) t
h: 0 < i

u_lt: S u = i

eq'': leading_entry_compute F (mat u) =
Maybe.just prev

u < iter,, iter_lt_sn

m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
p: n > 0
iter: ℕ
p': natgtb m iter = true
IH: ∏ p' : iter < S m,
(∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
 (j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
 i_1 < iter,, p'
 → is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
   → i_1 < i_2 → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring)

   i_1 < iter,, p'
   → mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
     → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring)
→ ∏ (i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
  i > j → i < iter,, p' → mat i j = 0%rig
re_1: ∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
(j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
  → i_1 < i_2
    → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring
re_2: ∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
  → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring

j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
lt: i > j
lt': i < S iter,, p'
iter_lt_sn:= istransnatlth iter m (S m) p'
  (natgthsnn m): iter < S m
eq: i = iter
eq': i = iter,, p'
t: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
jst: leading_entry_compute F (mat i) = Maybe.just t
contr_gt: j ≥ t
H1:= leading_entry_compute_inv2 F (mat i) t jst: is_leading_entry (mat i) t

F: fld
m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
p: n > 0
iter: ℕ
p': natgtb m iter = true
IH: ∏ p' : iter < S m,
(∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
 (j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
 i_1 < iter,, p'
 → is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
   → i_1 < i_2 → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring)
× (∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   i_1 < iter,, p'
   → mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
     → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring)
→ ∏ (i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
  i > j → i < iter,, p' → mat i j = 0%rig
re_1: ∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
(j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
  → i_1 < i_2
    → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring
re_2: ∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
  → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
lt: i > j
lt': i < S iter,, p'
iter_lt_sn:= istransnatlth iter m (S m) p'
  (natgthsnn m): iter < S m
eq: i = iter
eq': i = iter,, p'
t: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
jst: leading_entry_compute F (mat i) = Maybe.just t
contr_gt: j ≥ t
H1:= leading_entry_compute_inv2 F (mat i) t jst: is_leading_entry (mat i) t
h: 0 < i
u: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
u_lt: S u = i
prev: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
eq'': leading_entry_compute F (mat u) =
Maybe.just prev
H2:= leading_entry_compute_inv2 F (mat u) prev eq'': is_leading_entry (mat u) prev
∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
natgtb iter i_1 = true
→ is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
  → natgtb i_2 i_1 = true
    → match stntonat n j_1 with
      | 0 => true
      | S m => natgtb j_2 m
      end = true → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring
F: fld
m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
p: n > 0
iter: ℕ
p': natgtb m iter = true
IH: ∏ p' : iter < S m,
(∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
 (j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
 i_1 < iter,, p'
 → is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
   → i_1 < i_2 → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring)
× (∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   i_1 < iter,, p'
   → mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
     → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring)
→ ∏ (i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
  i > j → i < iter,, p' → mat i j = 0%rig
re_1: ∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
(j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
  → i_1 < i_2
    → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring
re_2: ∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
  → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
lt: i > j
lt': i < S iter,, p'
iter_lt_sn:= istransnatlth iter m (S m) p'
  (natgthsnn m): iter < S m
eq: i = iter
eq': i = iter,, p'
t: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
jst: leading_entry_compute F (mat i) = Maybe.just t
contr_gt: j ≥ t
H1:= leading_entry_compute_inv2 F (mat i) t jst: is_leading_entry (mat i) t
h: 0 < i
u: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
u_lt: S u = i
prev: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
eq'': leading_entry_compute F (mat u) =
Maybe.just prev
H2:= leading_entry_compute_inv2 F (mat u) prev eq'': is_leading_entry (mat u) prev
∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
natgtb iter i_1 = true
→ mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
  → natgtb i_2 i_1 = true → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring

eq'': leading_entry_compute F (mat u) =
Maybe.just prev
H2:= leading_entry_compute_inv2 F (mat u) prev eq'': is_leading_entry (mat u) prev
∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
natgtb iter i_1 = true
→ is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
  → natgtb i_2 i_1 = true
    → match stntonat n j_1 with
      | 0 => true
      | S m => natgtb j_2 m
      end = true → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring
 
F: fld
m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
p: n > 0
iter: ℕ
p': natgtb m iter = true
IH: ∏ p' : iter < S m,
(∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
 (j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
 i_1 < iter,, p'
 → is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
   → i_1 < i_2 → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring)
× (∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   i_1 < iter,, p'
   → mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
     → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring)
→ ∏ (i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
  i > j → i < iter,, p' → mat i j = 0%rig
re_1: ∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
(j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
  → i_1 < i_2
    → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring
re_2: ∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
  → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
lt: i > j
lt': i < S iter,, p'
iter_lt_sn:= istransnatlth iter m (S m) p'
  (natgthsnn m): iter < S m
eq: i = iter
eq': i = iter,, p'
t: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
jst: leading_entry_compute F (mat i) = Maybe.just t
contr_gt: j ≥ t
H1:= leading_entry_compute_inv2 F (mat i) t jst: is_leading_entry (mat i) t
h: 0 < i
u: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
u_lt: S u = i
prev: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
eq'': leading_entry_compute F (mat u) =
Maybe.just prev
H2:= leading_entry_compute_inv2 F (mat u) prev eq'': is_leading_entry (mat u) prev
i_1, i_2: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j_1, j_2: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
i1_lt_iter: natgtb iter i_1 = true
H': is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
X: natgtb i_2 i_1 = true
X0: match stntonat n j_1 with
| 0 => true
| S m => natgtb j_2 m
end = true
mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring

   i_1 < iter,, p'
   → mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
     → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring)
→ ∏ (i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
  i > j → i < iter,, p' → mat i j = 0%rig
re_1: ∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
(j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
  → i_1 < i_2

i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
  → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring

lt': i < S iter,, p'
iter_lt_sn:= istransnatlth iter m (S m) p'

eq': i = iter,, p'
t: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
jst: leading_entry_compute F (mat i) = Maybe.just t

u: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn

| 0 => true
| S m => natgtb j_2 m
end = true

             apply (istransnatlth _ _ _ i1_lt_iter (natgthsnn iter)).

m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
p: n > 0
iter: ℕ
p': natgtb m iter = true
IH: ∏ p' : iter < S m,
(∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
 (j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
 i_1 < iter,, p'
 → is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
   → i_1 < i_2 → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring)
× (∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   i_1 < iter,, p'
   → mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
     → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring)
→ ∏ (i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
  i > j → i < iter,, p' → mat i j = 0%rig
re_1: ∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
(j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
  → i_1 < i_2
    → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring
re_2: ∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
  → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
lt: i > j
lt': i < S iter,, p'
iter_lt_sn:= istransnatlth iter m (S m) p'
  (natgthsnn m): iter < S m
eq: i = iter
eq': i = iter,, p'
t: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
jst: leading_entry_compute F (mat i) = Maybe.just t
contr_gt: j ≥ t
H1:= leading_entry_compute_inv2 F (mat i) t jst: is_leading_entry (mat i) t

u: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
u_lt: S u = i
prev: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
eq'': leading_entry_compute F (mat u) =
Maybe.just prev
H2:= leading_entry_compute_inv2 F (mat u) prev eq'': is_leading_entry (mat u) prev
u > prev
 
F: fld
m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
p: n > 0
iter: ℕ
p': natgtb m iter = true
IH: ∏ p' : iter < S m,
(∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
 (j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
 i_1 < iter,, p'
 → is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
   → i_1 < i_2 → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring)
× (∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   i_1 < iter,, p'
   → mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
     → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring)
→ ∏ (i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
  i > j → i < iter,, p' → mat i j = 0%rig
re_1: ∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
(j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
  → i_1 < i_2
    → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring
re_2: ∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
  → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
lt: i > j
lt': i < S iter,, p'
iter_lt_sn:= istransnatlth iter m (S m) p'
  (natgthsnn m): iter < S m
eq: i = iter
eq': i = iter,, p'
t: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
jst: leading_entry_compute F (mat i) = Maybe.just t
contr_gt: j ≥ t
H1:= leading_entry_compute_inv2 F (mat i) t jst: is_leading_entry (mat i) t
h: 0 < i
u: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
u_lt: S u = i
prev: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
eq'': leading_entry_compute F (mat u) =
Maybe.just prev
H2:= leading_entry_compute_inv2 F (mat u) prev eq'': is_leading_entry (mat u) prev
leh: u ≤ prev
u > prev

  → i_1 < i_2
    → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring
re_2: ∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
  → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
lt: i > j
lt': i < S iter,, p'
iter_lt_sn:= istransnatlth iter m (S m) p'
  (natgthsnn m): iter < S m
eq: i = iter
eq': i = iter,, p'
t: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
jst: leading_entry_compute F (mat i) = Maybe.just t
contr_gt: j ≥ t
H1:= leading_entry_compute_inv2 F (mat i) t jst: is_leading_entry (mat i) t
h: 0 < i
u: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
u_lt: S u = i
prev: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
eq'': leading_entry_compute F (mat u) =
Maybe.just prev
H2:= leading_entry_compute_inv2 F (mat u) prev eq'': is_leading_entry (mat u) prev
leh: u ≤ prev
u < S iter,, p'
 apply natgehsntogth; rewrite u_lt, eq'; apply natgehsnn.

 i_1 < iter,, p'
 → is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
   → i_1 < i_2 → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring)
× (∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   i_1 < iter,, p'
   → mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
     → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring)
→ ∏ (i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
  i > j → i < iter,, p' → mat i j = 0%rig

(j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
  → i_1 < i_2

→ mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring

m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
p: n > 0
iter: ℕ
p': natgtb m iter = true
IH: ∏ p' : iter < S m,
(∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
 (j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
 i_1 < iter,, p'
 → is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
   → i_1 < i_2 → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring)
× (∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   i_1 < iter,, p'
   → mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
     → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring)
→ ∏ (i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
  i > j → i < iter,, p' → mat i j = 0%rig
re_1: ∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
(j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
  → i_1 < i_2
    → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring
re_2: ∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
  → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
lt: i > j
lt': i < S iter,, p'
iter_lt_sn:= istransnatlth iter m (S m) p'
  (natgthsnn m): iter < S m
eq: i = iter
eq': i = iter,, p'
t: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
jst: leading_entry_compute F (mat i) = Maybe.just t
contr_gt: j ≥ t
H1:= leading_entry_compute_inv2 F (mat i) t jst: is_leading_entry (mat i) t
h: 0 < i
u: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
u_lt: S u = i
prev: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
eq'': leading_entry_compute F (mat u) =
Maybe.just prev
H2:= leading_entry_compute_inv2 F (mat u) prev eq'': is_leading_entry (mat u) prev
leh: u ≤ prev
gt: t > prev
t ≤ prev
