 i_1 < iter,, p'
 → is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
   → i_1 < i_2 → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring)
× (∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   i_1 < iter,, p'
   → mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
     → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring)
→ ∏ (i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
  i > j → i < iter,, p' → mat i j = 0%rig
re_1: ∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
(j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
  → i_1 < i_2
    → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring
re_2: ∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
  → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
lt: i > j
lt': i < S iter,, p'
iter_lt_sn:= istransnatlth iter m (S m) p'
  (natgthsnn m): iter < S m
eq: i = iter
eq': i = iter,, p'
t: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
jst: leading_entry_compute F (mat i) = Maybe.just t
contr_gt: j ≥ t
H1:= leading_entry_compute_inv2 F (mat i) t jst: is_leading_entry (mat i) t

u_lt: S u = i
prev: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
eq'': leading_entry_compute F (mat u) =
Maybe.just prev

u < iter,, iter_lt_sn

m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
p: n > 0
iter: ℕ
p': natgtb m iter = true
IH: ∏ p' : iter < S m,
(∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
 (j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
 i_1 < iter,, p'
 → is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
   → i_1 < i_2 → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring)
× (∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   i_1 < iter,, p'
   → mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
     → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring)
→ ∏ (i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
  i > j → i < iter,, p' → mat i j = 0%rig
re_1: ∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
(j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
  → i_1 < i_2
    → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring
re_2: ∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
  → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
lt: i > j
lt': i < S iter,, p'
iter_lt_sn:= istransnatlth iter m (S m) p'
  (natgthsnn m): iter < S m
eq: i = iter
eq': i = iter,, p'
t: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
jst: leading_entry_compute F (mat i) = Maybe.just t
contr_gt: j ≥ t
H1:= leading_entry_compute_inv2 F (mat i) t jst: is_leading_entry (mat i) t
h: 0 < i
u: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
u_lt: S u = i
none_prev: leading_entry_compute F (mat u) =
Maybe.nothing
u < iter
 
F: fld
m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
p: n > 0
iter: ℕ
p': natgtb m iter = true
IH: ∏ p' : iter < S m,
(∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
 (j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
 i_1 < iter,, p'
 → is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
   → i_1 < i_2 → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring)
× (∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   i_1 < iter,, p'
   → mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
     → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring)
→ ∏ (i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
  i > j → i < iter,, p' → mat i j = 0%rig
re_1: ∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
(j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
  → i_1 < i_2
    → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring
re_2: ∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
  → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
lt: i > j
lt': i < S iter,, p'
iter_lt_sn:= istransnatlth iter m (S m) p'
  (natgthsnn m): iter < S m
eq: i = iter
eq': i = iter,, p'
t: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
jst: leading_entry_compute F (mat i) = Maybe.just t
contr_gt: j ≥ t
H1:= leading_entry_compute_inv2 F (mat i) t jst: is_leading_entry (mat i) t
h: 0 < i
u: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
u_lt: S u = i
none_prev: leading_entry_compute F (mat u) =
Maybe.nothing
u < i

          
F: fld
m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
p: n > 0
iter: ℕ
p': natgtb m iter = true
IH: ∏ p' : iter < S m,
(∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
 (j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
 i_1 < iter,, p'
 → is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
   → i_1 < i_2 → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring)
× (∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   i_1 < iter,, p'
   → mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
     → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring)
→ ∏ (i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
  i > j → i < iter,, p' → mat i j = 0%rig
re_1: ∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
(j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
  → i_1 < i_2
    → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring
re_2: ∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
  → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
lt: i > j
lt': i < S iter,, p'
iter_lt_sn:= istransnatlth iter m (S m) p'
  (natgthsnn m): iter < S m
eq: i = iter
eq': i = iter,, p'
t: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
jst: leading_entry_compute F (mat i) = Maybe.just t
contr_gt: j ≥ t
H1:= leading_entry_compute_inv2 F (mat i) t jst: is_leading_entry (mat i) t
h: 0 < i
u: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
u_lt: S u = i
none_prev: leading_entry_compute F (mat u) =
Maybe.nothing
u < i

          apply natgehsntogth; rewrite u_lt, eq'; apply isreflnatleh.
        
F: fld
m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
p: n > 0
iter: ℕ
p': natgtb m iter = true
IH: ∏ p' : iter < S m,
(∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
 (j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
 i_1 < iter,, p'
 → is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
   → i_1 < i_2 → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring)
× (∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   i_1 < iter,, p'
   → mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
     → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring)
→ ∏ (i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
  i > j → i < iter,, p' → mat i j = 0%rig
re_1: ∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
(j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
  → i_1 < i_2
    → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring
re_2: ∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
  → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
lt: i > j
lt': i < S iter,, p'
iter_lt_sn:= istransnatlth iter m (S m) p'
  (natgthsnn m): iter < S m
eq: i = iter
eq': i = iter,, p'
t: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
jst: leading_entry_compute F (mat i) = Maybe.just t
contr_gt: j ≥ t
H1:= leading_entry_compute_inv2 F (mat i) t jst: is_leading_entry (mat i) t
h: 0 < i
u: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
u_lt: S u = i
none_prev: leading_entry_compute F (mat u) =
Maybe.nothing
mat u = const_vec 0%ring
 apply funextfun; intros j';
          rewrite ((leading_entry_compute_inv1 _ _ none_prev) j');
          reflexivity.

m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
p: n > 0
iter: ℕ
p': natgtb m iter = true
IH: ∏ p' : iter < S m,
(∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
 (j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
 i_1 < iter,, p'
 → is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
   → i_1 < i_2 → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring)
× (∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   i_1 < iter,, p'
   → mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
     → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring)
→ ∏ (i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
  i > j → i < iter,, p' → mat i j = 0%rig

(j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
  → i_1 < i_2
    → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring

i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
  → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring

j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
lt: i > j
lt': i < S iter,, p'
iter_lt_sn:= istransnatlth iter m (S m) p'
  (natgthsnn m): iter < S m
eq: i = iter
eq': i = iter,, p'
t: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
jst: leading_entry_compute F (mat i) = Maybe.just t
contr_gt: j ≥ t
H1:= leading_entry_compute_inv2 F (mat i) t jst: is_leading_entry (mat i) t
h: 0 < i
u: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
u_lt: S u = i
none_prev: leading_entry_compute F (mat u) =
Maybe.nothing
u < i
 
F: fld
m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
p: n > 0
iter: ℕ
p': natgtb m iter = true
IH: ∏ p' : iter < S m,
(∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
 (j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
 i_1 < iter,, p'
 → is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
   → i_1 < i_2 → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring)
× (∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   i_1 < iter,, p'
   → mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
     → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring)
→ ∏ (i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
  i > j → i < iter,, p' → mat i j = 0%rig
re_1: ∏ (i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
(j_1 j_2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
  → i_1 < i_2
    → j_1 ≤ j_2 → mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring
re_2: ∏ i_1 i_2 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
i_1 < S iter,, p'
→ mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
  → i_1 < i_2 → mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
lt: i > j
lt': i < S iter,, p'
iter_lt_sn:= istransnatlth iter m (S m) p'
  (natgthsnn m): iter < S m
eq: i = iter
eq': i = iter,, p'
t: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
jst: leading_entry_compute F (mat i) = Maybe.just t
contr_gt: j ≥ t
H1:= leading_entry_compute_inv2 F (mat i) t jst: is_leading_entry (mat i) t
h: 0 < i
u: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
u_lt: S u = i
none_prev: leading_entry_compute F (mat u) =
Maybe.nothing
u < i

          apply natgehsntogth; rewrite u_lt, eq'; apply isreflnatleh.
  Defined.

  
F: fld
m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
is_row_echelon mat → is_upper_triangular mat

  
F: fld
m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
is_row_echelon mat → is_upper_triangular mat

    
F: fld
m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
contr_eq0: 0 = n
is_row_echelon mat → is_upper_triangular mat
F: fld
m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
p: 0 < n
is_row_echelon mat → is_upper_triangular mat

    
F: fld
m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
contr_eq0: 0 = n
is_row_echelon mat → is_upper_triangular mat
 intros ? ? j; apply fromstn0; now rewrite contr_eq0. 
F: fld
m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
p: 0 < n
is_row_echelon mat → is_upper_triangular mat

    
F: fld
m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
p: 0 < n
H: is_row_echelon mat
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
X: i > j
mat i j = 0%rig

    
F: fld
m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
p: 0 < n
H: is_row_echelon mat
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
X: i > j
is_row_echelon_partial F mat (m,, natgthsnn m)
F: fld
m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
p: 0 < n
H: is_row_echelon mat
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
X: i > j
i < m,, natgthsnn m
 
F: fld
m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
p: 0 < n
H: is_row_echelon mat
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
X: i > j
i < m,, natgthsnn m
exact (pr2 i). 
F: fld
m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
p: 0 < n
H: is_row_echelon mat
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
X: i > j
is_row_echelon_partial F mat (m,, natgthsnn m)

    
F: fld
m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
p: 0 < n
H: is_row_echelon mat
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
X: i > j
i_1, i_2: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j_1, j_2: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
X0: i_1 < m,, natgthsnn m
X1: is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
X2: i_1 < i_2
X3: j_1 ≤ j_2
mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring
F: fld
m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
p: 0 < n
H: is_row_echelon mat
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
X: i > j
i_1, i_2: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j_1: i_1 < m,, natgthsnn m
j_2: mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
X0: i_1 < i_2
mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring

    
F: fld
m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
p: 0 < n
H: is_row_echelon mat
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
X: i > j
i_1, i_2: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j_1, j_2: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
X0: i_1 < m,, natgthsnn m
X1: is_leading_entry (mat i_1) j_2
X2: i_1 < i_2
X3: j_1 ≤ j_2
mat i_2 j_1 = 0%ring
 destruct (H i_1 i_2) as [H1 _]; now rewrite (H1 j_2 j_1).
    
F: fld
m, n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F m n
p: 0 < n
H: is_row_echelon mat
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
X: i > j
i_1, i_2: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j_1: i_1 < m,, natgthsnn m
j_2: mat i_1 = const_vec 0%ring
X0: i_1 < i_2
mat i_2 = const_vec 0%ring
 destruct (H i_1 i_2) as [_ H2]; now rewrite H2.
  Defined.

End Misc.


Section Inverse.

  (** Some additional properties of matrix inverses,
      having now defined Gaussian elimination and
      back-substitution.

      Computes a matrix inverse or shows it is non-invertible. *)

  Context (F : fld).

  Local Notation Σ := (iterop_fun (@ringunel1 F) op1).
  Local Notation "A ** B" := (@matrix_mult F _ _ A _ B) (at level 40, left associativity).
  Local Notation "R1 *pw R2" := ((pointwise _ op2) R1 R2) (at level 40, left associativity).

  (** Construct the inverse,
    if additionally mat is upper triangular with non-zero diagonal *)
  Definition upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction
    { n : nat }
    (mat : Matrix F n n)
    := transpose (λ i : (stn n), (back_sub _ mat (@identity_matrix F n i))).

  
F: fld
n: ℕ
A: Matrix F n n
p: is_upper_triangular A
p': matrix_left_inverse A
diagonal_all_nonzero A

  
F: fld
n: ℕ
A: Matrix F n n
p: is_upper_triangular A
p': matrix_left_inverse A
diagonal_all_nonzero A

    
F: fld
n: ℕ
A: Matrix F n n
p: is_upper_triangular A
p': matrix_left_inverse A
l: ∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, diagonal_sq A j != 0%ring
diagonal_all_nonzero A
F: fld
n: ℕ
A: Matrix F n n
p: is_upper_triangular A
p': matrix_left_inverse A
r: ∑ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
diagonal_sq A i = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < pr1 i → diagonal_sq A j != 0%ring)
diagonal_all_nonzero A

    
F: fld
n: ℕ
A: Matrix F n n
p: is_upper_triangular A
p': matrix_left_inverse A
l: ∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, diagonal_sq A j != 0%ring
diagonal_all_nonzero A
 unfold diagonal_all_nonzero; intros; unfold diagonal_sq in l; apply l. 
F: fld
n: ℕ
A: Matrix F n n
p: is_upper_triangular A
p': matrix_left_inverse A
r: ∑ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
diagonal_sq A i = 0%ring
× (∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   j < pr1 i → diagonal_sq A j != 0%ring)
diagonal_all_nonzero A

    unfold diagonal_sq in r; apply fromempty; now apply (@back_sub_zero _ _ A p).
  Defined.

  
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
df: diagonal_all_nonzero mat
matrix_mult mat
  (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction mat) =
identity_matrix

  
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
df: diagonal_all_nonzero mat
matrix_mult mat
  (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction mat) =
identity_matrix

    
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
df: diagonal_all_nonzero mat
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
matrix_mult mat
  (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction mat) i =
identity_matrix i

    
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
df: diagonal_all_nonzero mat
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
(λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
 iterop_fun 0%rig op1
   (mat i *pw
    (λ y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
     upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction mat y
       j))) = identity_matrix i

    
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
df: diagonal_all_nonzero mat
i, x: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iterop_fun 0%rig op1
  (mat i *pw
   (λ y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction mat y
      x)) = identity_matrix i x

    
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
df: diagonal_all_nonzero mat
i, x: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
iterop_fun 0%rig op1
  (mat i *pw
   (λ y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    transpose
      (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
       back_sub F mat (identity_matrix i)) y x)) =
identity_matrix i x

    
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
df: diagonal_all_nonzero mat
i, x: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
identity_matrix x i = identity_matrix i x
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
df: diagonal_all_nonzero mat
i, x: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
matrix_mult mat
  (col_vec
     (λ y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
      transpose
        (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
         back_sub F mat (identity_matrix i)) y x)) =
col_vec (identity_matrix x)

    
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
df: diagonal_all_nonzero mat
i, x: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
identity_matrix x i = identity_matrix i x
 
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
df: diagonal_all_nonzero mat
i, x: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
eq: i = x
identity_matrix x i = identity_matrix i x
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
df: diagonal_all_nonzero mat
i, x: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
neq: NegativePropositions.negProp_to_hProp (i ≠ x)%stn
identity_matrix x i = identity_matrix i x

      
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
df: diagonal_all_nonzero mat
i, x: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
eq: i = x
identity_matrix x i = identity_matrix i x
 now rewrite eq. 
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
df: diagonal_all_nonzero mat
i, x: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
neq: NegativePropositions.negProp_to_hProp (i ≠ x)%stn
identity_matrix x i = identity_matrix i x

      
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
df: diagonal_all_nonzero mat
i, x: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
neq: NegativePropositions.negProp_to_hProp (i ≠ x)%stn
x ≠ i

      apply (issymm_natneq _ _ neq).
    
F: fld
n: ℕ
mat: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular mat
df: diagonal_all_nonzero mat
i, x: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
matrix_mult mat
  (col_vec
     (λ y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
      transpose
        (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
         back_sub F mat (identity_matrix i)) y x)) =
col_vec (identity_matrix x)

F: fld

A, B: Matrix F n n

  (matrix_mult A

F: fld
n: ℕ
A, B: Matrix F n n
X: matrix_mult B A = identity_matrix
gt: 0 < n

nonz: diagonal_all_nonzero CA
invmat: matrix_mult C
  (matrix_mult A
     (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction
        (matrix_mult C A))) = identity_matrix
eq: matrix_mult (matrix_mult C A) D =
matrix_mult (matrix_mult A D) C
matrix_mult A (matrix_mult D C) = identity_matrix

  (matrix_mult A

  (matrix_mult A

        (matrix_mult C A))) C

      
F: fld
n: ℕ
A, B: Matrix F n n
X: matrix_mult B A = identity_matrix
gt: 0 < n
C:= pr1 (gaussian_elimination F A): Matrix F n n
inv: matrix_inverse (pr1 (gaussian_elimination F A))

  (matrix_mult
     (pr1 (gaussian_elimination F A)) A)
CA:= matrix_mult C A: Matrix F n n
D:= upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction CA: Matrix F n n
CA_ut: is_upper_triangular CA
nonz: diagonal_all_nonzero CA
invmat: matrix_mult C
  (matrix_mult A
     (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction
        (matrix_mult C A))) = identity_matrix
left_inv_eq_right:= @matrix_left_inverse_equals_right_inverse: ∏ R : rig,
ℕ
→ ∏ n : ℕ,
  ℕ
  → ∏ (A : Matrix R n n)
    (lft : matrix_left_inverse A)
    (rght : matrix_right_inverse A),
    pr1 lft = pr1 rght
identity_matrix =
matrix_mult
  (matrix_mult A
     (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction
        (matrix_mult C A))) C

      
F: fld
n: ℕ
A, B: Matrix F n n
X: matrix_mult B A = identity_matrix
gt: 0 < n
C:= pr1 (gaussian_elimination F A): Matrix F n n
inv: matrix_inverse (pr1 (gaussian_elimination F A))
is_re: is_row_echelon
  (matrix_mult
     (pr1 (gaussian_elimination F A)) A)
CA:= matrix_mult C A: Matrix F n n
D:= upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction CA: Matrix F n n
CA_ut: is_upper_triangular CA
nonz: diagonal_all_nonzero CA
invmat: matrix_mult C
  (matrix_mult A
     (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction
        (matrix_mult C A))) = identity_matrix
left_inv_eq_right:= @matrix_left_inverse_equals_right_inverse: ∏ R : rig,
ℕ
→ ∏ n : ℕ,
  ℕ
  → ∏ (A : Matrix R n n)
    (lft : matrix_left_inverse A)
    (rght : matrix_right_inverse A),
    pr1 lft = pr1 rght
matrix_mult
  (matrix_mult A
     (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction
        (matrix_mult C A))) C = identity_matrix

A, B: Matrix F n n

→ ∏ n : ℕ,

F: fld
n: ℕ
A, B: Matrix F n n
X: matrix_mult B A = identity_matrix
gt: 0 < n
C:= pr1 (gaussian_elimination F A): Matrix F n n
inv: matrix_inverse (pr1 (gaussian_elimination F A))
is_re: is_row_echelon
  (matrix_mult
     (pr1 (gaussian_elimination F A)) A)
CA:= matrix_mult C A: Matrix F n n
D:= upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction CA: Matrix F n n
CA_ut: is_upper_triangular CA
nonz: diagonal_all_nonzero CA
invmat: matrix_mult C
  (matrix_mult A
     (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction
        (matrix_mult C A))) = identity_matrix
eq: matrix_mult (matrix_mult C A) D =
matrix_mult (matrix_mult A D) C
matrix_mult A (matrix_mult D C) = identity_matrix

    
F: fld
n: ℕ
A, B: Matrix F n n
X: matrix_mult B A = identity_matrix
gt: 0 < n
C:= pr1 (gaussian_elimination F A): Matrix F n n

  (matrix_mult
     (pr1 (gaussian_elimination F A)) A)
CA:= matrix_mult C A: Matrix F n n
D:= upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction CA: Matrix F n n
CA_ut: is_upper_triangular CA
nonz: diagonal_all_nonzero CA
invmat: matrix_mult C
  (matrix_mult A
     (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction
        (matrix_mult C A))) = identity_matrix
eq: matrix_mult (matrix_mult C A) D =
matrix_mult (matrix_mult A D) C
matrix_mult (matrix_mult C A) D =
matrix_mult C
  (matrix_mult A
     (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction
        (matrix_mult C A)))

    apply matrix_mult_assoc.
  Defined.

F: fld
n: ℕ
A, B, rinv: Matrix F n n
isrinv: matrix_mult A rinv = identity_matrix
linv:= make_matrix_left_inverse A rinv isrinv: matrix_left_inverse rinv
linv_to_rinv:= matrix_left_inverse_implies_right rinv A
  isrinv: matrix_right_inverse rinv
inv_eq:= matrix_left_inverse_equals_right_inverse rinv
  linv linv_to_rinv: pr1 linv = pr1 linv_to_rinv
matrix_mult rinv A = identity_matrix

    simpl in inv_eq; rewrite inv_eq;
    apply linv_to_rinv.
  Defined.

C:= upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction BA: Matrix F n n
is_echelon:= gauss_clear_all_rows_inv3 F A gt: is_row_echelon (gauss_clear_all_rows F A)
is_upper_triangular (matrix_mult B A)

      
F: fld
n: ℕ
A: Matrix F n n
gt: 0 < n
B:= gauss_clear_all_rows_as_left_matrix F A gt: Matrix F n n
BA:= matrix_mult B A: Matrix F n n
C:= upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction BA: Matrix F n n
is_echelon: is_row_echelon
  (matrix_mult
     (gauss_clear_all_rows_as_left_matrix
        F A gt) A)
is_upper_triangular (matrix_mult B A)

      now apply row_echelon_to_upper_triangular.

B:= gauss_clear_all_rows_as_left_matrix F A gt: Matrix F n n
BA:= matrix_mult B A: Matrix F n n
C:= upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction BA: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular BA
matrix_inverse A ⨿ (matrix_inverse A → ∅)

F: fld
n: ℕ
A: Matrix F n n
gt: 0 < n
B:= gauss_clear_all_rows_as_left_matrix F A gt: Matrix F n n
BA:= matrix_mult B A: Matrix F n n
C:= upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction BA: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular BA
nz: ∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, BA j j != 0%ring

  (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction
     BA) = identity_matrix
matrix_mult C BA = identity_matrix
 apply (@matrix_right_inverse_implies_left _ _ C (C,, BAC_id)).

F: fld
n: ℕ
A: Matrix F n n
gt: 0 < n
B:= gauss_clear_all_rows_as_left_matrix F A gt: Matrix F n n
BA:= matrix_mult B A: Matrix F n n
C:= upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction BA: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular BA
nz: ∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, BA j j != 0%ring
BAC_id:= matrix_right_inverse_construction_inv BA ut nz: matrix_mult BA

     BA) = identity_matrix
rinv_eq: matrix_mult C BA = identity_matrix
matrix_mult A (matrix_mult C B) = identity_matrix
F: fld
n: ℕ
A: Matrix F n n
gt: 0 < n
B:= gauss_clear_all_rows_as_left_matrix F A gt: Matrix F n n
BA:= matrix_mult B A: Matrix F n n
C:= upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction BA: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular BA
nz: ∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, BA j j != 0%ring
BAC_id:= matrix_right_inverse_construction_inv BA ut nz: matrix_mult BA
  (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction
     BA) = identity_matrix
rinv_eq: matrix_mult C BA = identity_matrix
(λ _ : matrix_mult A (matrix_mult C B) =
       identity_matrix,
 matrix_mult (matrix_mult C B) A = identity_matrix)
  ?pr1

      
F: fld
n: ℕ
A: Matrix F n n
gt: 0 < n
B:= gauss_clear_all_rows_as_left_matrix F A gt: Matrix F n n
BA:= matrix_mult B A: Matrix F n n
C:= upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction BA: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular BA
nz: ∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, BA j j != 0%ring
BAC_id:= matrix_right_inverse_construction_inv BA ut nz: matrix_mult BA
  (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction
     BA) = identity_matrix
rinv_eq: matrix_mult C BA = identity_matrix
(λ _ : matrix_mult A (matrix_mult C B) =
       identity_matrix,
 matrix_mult (matrix_mult C B) A = identity_matrix)
  ?pr1
 simpl; rewrite matrix_mult_assoc; apply rinv_eq.

  (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction
     BA) = identity_matrix

matrix_mult A (matrix_mult C B) = identity_matrix

n: ℕ

F: fld
n: ℕ
A: Matrix F n n
gt: 0 < n
B:= gauss_clear_all_rows_as_left_matrix F A gt: Matrix F n n

C:= upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction BA: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular BA
nz: ∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, BA j j != 0%ring
BAC_id:= matrix_right_inverse_construction_inv
  (matrix_mult B A) ut nz: matrix_mult (matrix_mult B A)
  (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction
     (matrix_mult B A)) = identity_matrix
rinv_eq: matrix_mult C BA = identity_matrix
matrix_mult (matrix_mult A C) B = identity_matrix

      
F: fld
n: ℕ
A: Matrix F n n
gt: 0 < n
B:= gauss_clear_all_rows_as_left_matrix F A gt: Matrix F n n
BA:= matrix_mult B A: Matrix F n n
C:= upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction BA: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular BA
nz: ∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, BA j j != 0%ring

  (matrix_mult B A) ut nz: matrix_mult (matrix_mult B A)
  (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction
     (matrix_mult B A)) = identity_matrix
rinv_eq: matrix_mult C BA = identity_matrix
matrix_mult (matrix_mult B A) C =
matrix_mult (matrix_mult A C) B
F: fld
n: ℕ
A: Matrix F n n
gt: 0 < n
B:= gauss_clear_all_rows_as_left_matrix F A gt: Matrix F n n
BA:= matrix_mult B A: Matrix F n n
C:= upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction BA: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular BA
nz: ∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, BA j j != 0%ring
BAC_id:= matrix_right_inverse_construction_inv
  (matrix_mult B A) ut nz: matrix_mult (matrix_mult B A)
  (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction
     (matrix_mult B A)) = identity_matrix
rinv_eq: matrix_mult C BA = identity_matrix
linv_eq: matrix_mult (matrix_mult B A) C =
matrix_mult (matrix_mult A C) B
matrix_mult (matrix_mult A C) B = identity_matrix

  (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction
     (matrix_mult B A)) = identity_matrix

n: ℕ
A: Matrix F n n
gt: 0 < n
B:= gauss_clear_all_rows_as_left_matrix F A gt: Matrix F n n
BA:= matrix_mult B A: Matrix F n n
C:= upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction BA: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular BA
nz: ∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, BA j j != 0%ring
BAC_id: matrix_mult B
  (matrix_mult A
     (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction
        (matrix_mult B A))) = identity_matrix
rinv_eq: matrix_mult C BA = identity_matrix
matrix_mult B (matrix_mult A C) =

F: fld
n: ℕ
A: Matrix F n n
gt: 0 < n
B:= gauss_clear_all_rows_as_left_matrix F A gt: Matrix F n n
BA:= matrix_mult B A: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular BA
nz: ∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, BA j j != 0%ring
BAC_id: matrix_mult B
  (matrix_mult A
     (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction
        (matrix_mult B A))) = identity_matrix
rinv_eq: matrix_mult
  (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction
     BA) BA = identity_matrix
C:= upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction BA: Matrix F n n

F: fld
n: ℕ
A: Matrix F n n
gt: 0 < n
B:= gauss_clear_all_rows_as_left_matrix F A gt: Matrix F n n
BA:= matrix_mult B A: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular BA
nz: ∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, BA j j != 0%ring
BAC_id: matrix_mult B
  (matrix_mult A
     (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction
        (matrix_mult B A))) = identity_matrix
rinv_eq: matrix_mult
  (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction
     BA) BA = identity_matrix
C:= upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction BA: Matrix F n n
B_rinv:= make_matrix_right_inverse B 
  (matrix_mult A C) BAC_id: matrix_right_inverse B
matrix_mult B (matrix_mult A C) =
matrix_mult (matrix_mult A C) B

        
F: fld
n: ℕ
A: Matrix F n n
gt: 0 < n
B:= gauss_clear_all_rows_as_left_matrix F A gt: Matrix F n n
BA:= matrix_mult B A: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular BA
nz: ∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, BA j j != 0%ring
BAC_id: matrix_mult B
  (matrix_mult A
     (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction
        (matrix_mult B A))) = identity_matrix
rinv_eq: matrix_mult
  (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction
     BA) BA = identity_matrix
C:= upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction BA: Matrix F n n
B_rinv:= make_matrix_right_inverse B 
  (matrix_mult A C) BAC_id: matrix_right_inverse B
linv:= matrix_right_inverse_implies_left B C B_rinv: matrix_left_inverse B
matrix_mult B (matrix_mult A C) =
matrix_mult (matrix_mult A C) B

        
F: fld
n: ℕ
A: Matrix F n n
gt: 0 < n
B:= gauss_clear_all_rows_as_left_matrix F A gt: Matrix F n n
BA:= matrix_mult B A: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular BA
nz: ∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, BA j j != 0%ring
BAC_id: matrix_mult B
  (matrix_mult A
     (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction
        (matrix_mult B A))) = identity_matrix
rinv_eq: matrix_mult
  (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction
     BA) BA = identity_matrix
C:= upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction BA: Matrix F n n
B_rinv:= make_matrix_right_inverse B 
  (matrix_mult A C) BAC_id: matrix_right_inverse B
linv:= matrix_right_inverse_implies_left B C B_rinv: matrix_left_inverse B
eq:= matrix_left_inverse_equals_right_inverse B linv
  (matrix_mult A C,, BAC_id): pr1 linv = pr1 (matrix_mult A C,, BAC_id)
matrix_mult B (matrix_mult A C) =
matrix_mult (matrix_mult A C) B

        
F: fld
n: ℕ
A: Matrix F n n
gt: 0 < n
B:= gauss_clear_all_rows_as_left_matrix F A gt: Matrix F n n
BA:= matrix_mult B A: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular BA
nz: ∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, BA j j != 0%ring
BAC_id: matrix_mult B
  (matrix_mult A
     (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction
        (matrix_mult B A))) = identity_matrix
rinv_eq: matrix_mult
  (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction
     BA) BA = identity_matrix
C:= upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction BA: Matrix F n n
B_rinv:= make_matrix_right_inverse B 
  (matrix_mult A C) BAC_id: matrix_right_inverse B
linv:= matrix_right_inverse_implies_left B C B_rinv: matrix_left_inverse B
eq:= matrix_left_inverse_equals_right_inverse B linv
  (matrix_mult A C,, BAC_id): pr1 linv = pr1 (matrix_mult A C,, BAC_id)
matrix_mult B (matrix_mult A C) = ?b
F: fld
n: ℕ
A: Matrix F n n
gt: 0 < n
B:= gauss_clear_all_rows_as_left_matrix F A gt: Matrix F n n
BA:= matrix_mult B A: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular BA
nz: ∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, BA j j != 0%ring
BAC_id: matrix_mult B
  (matrix_mult A
     (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction
        (matrix_mult B A))) = identity_matrix
rinv_eq: matrix_mult
  (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction
     BA) BA = identity_matrix
C:= upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction BA: Matrix F n n
B_rinv:= make_matrix_right_inverse B 
  (matrix_mult A C) BAC_id: matrix_right_inverse B
linv:= matrix_right_inverse_implies_left B C B_rinv: matrix_left_inverse B
eq:= matrix_left_inverse_equals_right_inverse B linv
  (matrix_mult A C,, BAC_id): pr1 linv = pr1 (matrix_mult A C,, BAC_id)
?b = matrix_mult (matrix_mult A C) B

n: ℕ
A: Matrix F n n
gt: 0 < n
B:= gauss_clear_all_rows_as_left_matrix F A gt: Matrix F n n
BA:= matrix_mult B A: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular BA
nz: ∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, BA j j != 0%ring

  (matrix_mult A
     (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction
        (matrix_mult B A))) = identity_matrix

  (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction
     BA) BA = identity_matrix
C:= upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction BA: Matrix F n n

  (matrix_mult A C) BAC_id: matrix_right_inverse B
linv:= matrix_right_inverse_implies_left B C B_rinv: matrix_left_inverse B

  (matrix_mult A C,, BAC_id): pr1 linv = pr1 (matrix_mult A C,, BAC_id)

F: fld
n: ℕ
A: Matrix F n n
gt: 0 < n
B:= gauss_clear_all_rows_as_left_matrix F A gt: Matrix F n n
BA:= matrix_mult B A: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular BA
nz: ∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, BA j j != 0%ring
BAC_id: matrix_mult B
  (matrix_mult A
     (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction
        (matrix_mult B A))) = identity_matrix
rinv_eq: matrix_mult
  (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction
     BA) BA = identity_matrix
C:= upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction BA: Matrix F n n
B_rinv:= make_matrix_right_inverse B 
  (matrix_mult A C) BAC_id: matrix_right_inverse B
linv:= matrix_right_inverse_implies_left B C B_rinv: matrix_left_inverse B
eq:= matrix_left_inverse_equals_right_inverse B linv
  (matrix_mult A C,, BAC_id): pr1 linv = pr1 (matrix_mult A C,, BAC_id)
matrix_mult B (pr1 B_rinv) = ?b

          rewrite (pr2 B_rinv); reflexivity. 
F: fld
n: ℕ
A: Matrix F n n
gt: 0 < n
B:= gauss_clear_all_rows_as_left_matrix F A gt: Matrix F n n
BA:= matrix_mult B A: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular BA
nz: ∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, BA j j != 0%ring
BAC_id: matrix_mult B
  (matrix_mult A
     (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction
        (matrix_mult B A))) = identity_matrix
rinv_eq: matrix_mult
  (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction
     BA) BA = identity_matrix
C:= upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction BA: Matrix F n n
B_rinv:= make_matrix_right_inverse B 
  (matrix_mult A C) BAC_id: matrix_right_inverse B
linv:= matrix_right_inverse_implies_left B C B_rinv: matrix_left_inverse B
eq:= matrix_left_inverse_equals_right_inverse B linv
  (matrix_mult A C,, BAC_id): pr1 linv = pr1 (matrix_mult A C,, BAC_id)
identity_matrix = matrix_mult (matrix_mult A C) B

        
F: fld
n: ℕ
A: Matrix F n n
gt: 0 < n
B:= gauss_clear_all_rows_as_left_matrix F A gt: Matrix F n n
BA:= matrix_mult B A: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular BA
nz: ∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, BA j j != 0%ring
BAC_id: matrix_mult B
  (matrix_mult A
     (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction
        (matrix_mult B A))) = identity_matrix
rinv_eq: matrix_mult
  (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction
     BA) BA = identity_matrix
C:= upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction BA: Matrix F n n
B_rinv:= make_matrix_right_inverse B 
  (matrix_mult A C) BAC_id: matrix_right_inverse B
linv:= matrix_right_inverse_implies_left B C B_rinv: matrix_left_inverse B
eq:= matrix_left_inverse_equals_right_inverse B linv
  (matrix_mult A C,, BAC_id): pr1 linv = matrix_mult A C
identity_matrix = matrix_mult (matrix_mult A C) B

        
F: fld
n: ℕ
A: Matrix F n n
gt: 0 < n
B:= gauss_clear_all_rows_as_left_matrix F A gt: Matrix F n n
BA:= matrix_mult B A: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular BA
nz: ∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, BA j j != 0%ring
BAC_id: matrix_mult B
  (matrix_mult A
     (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction
        (matrix_mult B A))) = identity_matrix
rinv_eq: matrix_mult
  (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction
     BA) BA = identity_matrix
C:= upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction BA: Matrix F n n
B_rinv:= make_matrix_right_inverse B 
  (matrix_mult A C) BAC_id: matrix_right_inverse B
linv:= matrix_right_inverse_implies_left B C B_rinv: matrix_left_inverse B
eq:= matrix_left_inverse_equals_right_inverse B linv
  (matrix_mult A C,, BAC_id): pr1 linv = matrix_mult A C
identity_matrix = identity_matrix

        apply idpath.
      
F: fld
n: ℕ
A: Matrix F n n
gt: 0 < n
B:= gauss_clear_all_rows_as_left_matrix F A gt: Matrix F n n
BA:= matrix_mult B A: Matrix F n n
C:= upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction BA: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular BA
nz: ∏ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, BA j j != 0%ring
BAC_id:= matrix_right_inverse_construction_inv
  (matrix_mult B A) ut nz: matrix_mult (matrix_mult B A)
  (upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction
     (matrix_mult B A)) = identity_matrix
rinv_eq: matrix_mult C BA = identity_matrix
linv_eq: matrix_mult (matrix_mult B A) C =
matrix_mult (matrix_mult A C) B
matrix_mult (matrix_mult A C) B = identity_matrix

      simpl in * |- ;
      now rewrite <- BAC_id, <- linv_eq.
    
F: fld
n: ℕ
A: Matrix F n n
gt: 0 < n
B:= gauss_clear_all_rows_as_left_matrix F A gt: Matrix F n n
BA:= matrix_mult B A: Matrix F n n
C:= upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction BA: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular BA
idx: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
isnotz: BA idx idx = 0%ring
matrix_inverse A ⨿ (matrix_inverse A → ∅)
 
F: fld
n: ℕ
A: Matrix F n n
gt: 0 < n
B:= gauss_clear_all_rows_as_left_matrix F A gt: Matrix F n n
BA:= matrix_mult B A: Matrix F n n
C:= upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction BA: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular BA
idx: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
isnotz: BA idx idx = 0%ring
matrix_inverse A → ∅

      
F: fld
n: ℕ
A: Matrix F n n
gt: 0 < n
B:= gauss_clear_all_rows_as_left_matrix F A gt: Matrix F n n

invM: Matrix F n n
isl: matrix_mult A invM = identity_matrix
isr: matrix_mult invM A = identity_matrix
∅

n: ℕ

gt: 0 < n

isr: matrix_mult invM A = identity_matrix

∅

matrix_left_inverse B

        apply (@matrix_inverse_to_right_and_left_inverse F _ B),
          gauss_clear_all_rows_matrix_invertible. 
F: fld
n: ℕ
A: Matrix F n n
gt: 0 < n
B:= gauss_clear_all_rows_as_left_matrix F A gt: Matrix F n n
BA:= matrix_mult B A: Matrix F n n
C:= upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction BA: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular BA
idx: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn

invM: Matrix F n n
isl: matrix_mult A invM = identity_matrix
isr: matrix_mult invM A = identity_matrix

∅

      
F: fld
n: ℕ
A: Matrix F n n
gt: 0 < n
B:= gauss_clear_all_rows_as_left_matrix F A gt: Matrix F n n
BA:= matrix_mult B A: Matrix F n n
C:= upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction BA: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular BA
idx: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
isnotz: BA idx idx = 0%ring
invM: Matrix F n n
isl: matrix_mult A invM = identity_matrix
isr: matrix_mult invM A = identity_matrix
isinv:= make_matrix_left_inverse invM A isr: matrix_left_inverse A
isinvprod: matrix_left_inverse BA
contr_eq:= left_invertible_upper_triangular_to_diagonal_all_nonzero
  BA ut isinvprod idx: BA idx idx != 0%rig
∅

      
F: fld
n: ℕ
A: Matrix F n n
gt: 0 < n
B:= gauss_clear_all_rows_as_left_matrix F A gt: Matrix F n n
BA:= matrix_mult B A: Matrix F n n
C:= upper_triangular_right_inverse_construction BA: Matrix F n n
ut: is_upper_triangular BA
idx: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
isnotz: BA idx idx = 0%ring
invM: Matrix F n n
isl: matrix_mult A invM = identity_matrix
isr: matrix_mult invM A = identity_matrix
isinv:= make_matrix_left_inverse invM A isr: matrix_left_inverse A
isinvprod: matrix_left_inverse BA
contr_eq: 0%ring != 0%rig
∅

      contradiction.
  Defined.

End Inverse.
